name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Candidate Dr. Neil Shah Signs Never Again Pledge
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The media and government's new fear campaign is in full force. New York City just instituted vaccine passports. Health freedom be damned! **Even Walz is hinting at declaring new Emergency Powers to create a new mask mandate. And the MN Dept of Health is now paying[12 year olds $100 to get the vaccine](https://www.action4liberty.com/walz_luring_12_yr_olds_with_money_to_get_experimental_jab?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=2).** This is all happening because career politicians in St Paul REFUSED to pass Rep Erik Mortensen's **Never Again Bill** into law. I can't think of a more important issue in politics than this. Clearly politicians are hell bent on eroding our liberties in the name of "stopping the spread". Fortunately, the race to remove Governor Walz from office has a new doctor in it! [Dr. Neil Shah](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rOkbRklTyTNtmBTRPmVdijk&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=3) launched his campaign this morning to Save Minnesota from career politicians. I agree. Career politicians are a huge problem! Dr. Shah owns a growing medical practice in Minnesota that was shut down unilaterally by Governor Walz when he decided to ban elective surgeries in 2020. It not only impacted the business he worked so hard to build, but his patients missed early diagnosis for serious issues like skin cancer. So Dr. Shah decided to get in the race as an outsider, because career politicians keep screwing things up. And he just signed the [Never Again Pledge](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=4) today pledging to the people of Minnesota to make passing the **Never Again Bill** his top priority as Governor [](https://www.action4liberty.com/gov_candidate_dr_neil_shah_signs_never_again_pledge?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=5) **[Thank you Dr. Neil Shah](mailto:neil.shah@electneil.com) for pledging to stop the tyranny and ensure it Never Happens Again. He joins Mayor Mike Murphy and businessman Mike Marti who also signed the same pledge. ** Scott Jensen still refuses to sign the Never Again Pledge and has stated he is open to using Emergency Powers for things like curfews. Take the time to thank Dr. Neil Shah for making the **Never Again Bill** a priority. Let's end lockdowns, mask mandates and forced vaccinations for good! **Thank Dr. Neil Shah for signing the pledge at[neil.shah@electneil.com.](mailto:neil.shah@electneil.com) ** **In Liberty,** **** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=6).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=candidate_dr_shah_signs&n=8), software for leaders.

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=43cd0090d7fc450ba6a9fd27aa1acc5b&_e=Ou3r72O17URFSABHuyUtSWTM8u2POeY3VI3x1b8j1p1uMIusIA1u8rUOud0Cycz_m99u3GHBXJtfu5mwzBE_g2bR3m6riK2jW55kCrwFogiQPA9hTNAhyxJ0-xDZ6ot_1R8Nykhz3nOwSW6oymkXE2UeaANTmY2ZNickLb5Qwn-WDQKCLnx77tQBomHm4f6mxFTfrxVk7FEs3b-747UpvN1sSriHRnim1pvSoS9OvxU3Dxzw4LUYZQqbwxBV6uyvMe-_aIHHU0gk16VzLb3i-Ge9N9NeP3o5QVJDkRrul0qJT7pk9i8n1lNjX4WGWkNWJ6YbTGuiki8D-iTsSxpUJ62_sjzQYnSY_gcnYL7EnoyNsLdTiipMS6PdiEGIllllT7HwmV0zmaxviTdm5mzIo8hq7iM-I6YzSqU-5lUryfhNIQ6m9MOHlcfW6qnHhjEIQxmwBgqcNnEYW7dhEshfGVNiZ82Rqr6jRI11NMYmE7iq8pkwpqAYjrdfj6ad-pug54L7-FEzV9XFf1D7wZBc_cSYisg739hndHImfVN6FKc%3D)

Friend,

Mask mandates are starting to pop back up across the country, including in the United States House of Representatives. We need to stand up and say NO to these tyrannical mandates.

**_We can’t allow the Radical Left to send us into another lockdown as a demonstration of power. We have to shut down socialism, not our society._**
| [**SHUT DOWN SOCIALISM NOT SOCIETY**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=43cd0090d7fc450ba6a9fd27aa1acc5b&_e=Ou3r72O17URFSABHuyUtSWTM8u2POeY3VI3x1b8j1p1uMIusIA1u8rUOud0Cycz_m99u3GHBXJtfu5mwzBE_g2bR3m6riK2jW55kCrwFogiQPA9hTNAhyxJ0-xDZ6ot_1R8Nykhz3nOwSW6oymkXE2UeaANTmY2ZNickLb5Qwn-WDQKCLnx77tQBomHm4f6mxFTfrxVk7FEs3b-747UpvN1sSriHRnim1pvSoS9OvxU3Dxzw4LUYZQqbwxBV6uyvMe-_aIHHU0gk16VzLb3i-Ge9N9NeP3o5QVJDkRrul0qJT7pk9i8n1lNjX4WGWkNWJ6YbTGuiki8D-iTsSxpUJzb2g9tJZT7pZYJsS1CRPUSHgQ1-FoszngCVLQSTDmxEqCrFy1RUUfqnwtY8rb5797dtrDJBDO7RjD1OnA38Igr1m0OClDBvXnEFGLf6qc_IFi4IqVbUf-Cc5TXZPWCJuiwqcHJImmiL29zTdmNwGFI_dvzYGFQz6w2ooqIfNQ1IzQL8bBXBVwqo8TMfP5ECNEa7PMblSTD50MFqp3i-gZ0%3D)
---

As a doctor, I can tell you these mask mandates are anti-science and anti-common sense.

If we don’t put an end to this now, who's to say it will stop at just the masks?

The Democrats’ agenda is ruthless and tyrannical. All they want is control, and they will continue to spread lies to the American people if it means more power for themselves.

**We need to take a stand against the ridiculous power plays committed by the Radical Left, or we’re in trouble.**

[**Can you chip in now to help my efforts to stop Pelosi and the Radical Left in their tracks?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=43cd0090d7fc450ba6a9fd27aa1acc5b&_e=Ou3r72O17URFSABHuyUtSWTM8u2POeY3VI3x1b8j1p1uMIusIA1u8rUOud0Cycz_m99u3GHBXJtfu5mwzBE_g2bR3m6riK2jW55kCrwFogiQPA9hTNAhyxJ0-xDZ6ot_1R8Nykhz3nOwSW6oymkXE2UeaANTmY2ZNickLb5Qwn-WDQKCLnx77tQBomHm4f6mxFTfrxVk7FEs3b-747UpvN1sSriHRnim1pvSoS9OvxU3Dxzw4LUYZQqbwxBV6uyvMe-_aIHHU0gk16VzLb3i-Ge9N9NeP3o5QVJDkRrul0qJT7pk9i8n1lNjX4WGWkNWJ6YbTGuiki8D-iTsSxpUJzQW_bXfYrdTjPUBRaDDf1o9wBxfIGkwrJGxrLP7TORhgjIb8wqZwcW9z2r12YYaAraArdJH7IIf9onyE1-avlYn8KsYIZptpVst_RhS-1eSBRANNr7QIHoCkynASrBl0MoO_utY6L8evh9Kmu2RYlbKOaLo6cVaYzwqiJlfAsZO39DLQ9ZszqIT_lqEoYb46ZBHnvZ9hha6a-MS3ksXvBk%3D)

I beat Pelosi when she tried to overturn my certified election victory, and I can beat her again. With your help, we can return to a normal, healthy, and free society.

Thank you for your continued support.

God bless,

subject: Thank You
body:
Mike Carey Wins OH-15 Primary | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikecareywins?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Mike Carey Statement on OH-15 Victory** _Columbus_ \- Mike Carey issued the following statement after his victory in tonight's primary race for Ohio's 15th Congressional District.

"Tonight, Republicans across Ohio’s 15th Congressional District sent a clear message to the nation that President Donald J. Trump is, without a doubt, the leader of our party. I could not be more grateful for his support, and I am proud to deliver this win to advance his America First agenda. To the Republican voters of this district - thank you. I am truly humbled that you have entrusted me with this responsibility and I promise to be the fighter that you deserve in Congress. And to the rest of the voters across the district, I look forward to meeting you and earning your support over the next few months. I’d like to thank my opponents for running commendable races, and I invite them to join us as we set our sights on November. Ohio can lead the charge to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi and the radical Democrats, but only if we come together and win on November 2. Finally, I would like to thank all of our supporters, volunteers and donors for helping us earn this victory; my staff for their dedication to this campaign; and most importantly my incredible family for always standing by my side." ### Contact
Blaine Kelly
blaine@careyforcongress.com
614-517-7440

|

**STAND WITH RAND: No more masks, no vaccine mandates, no COVID passports.** **[Chip in if you agree!>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58068425:JG_9xxlN1:m:1:3253819041:82BEF2E0D50DDA0B7A89D8727EC29BAF:r) ** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58068425:JG_9xxlN1:m:1:3253819041:82BEF2E0D50DDA0B7A89D8727EC29BAF:r) | |

Peter, every study that has focused on natural immunity for COVID agrees that natural immunity is just as good as the vaccine. _But Biden and the radical left want to force a vaccine mandate._

There's no science to support the continued wearing of masks, either, especially for children! _But Biden and the radical left are trying to force new mask mandates._

It has NOTHING to do with science and EVERYTHING to do with control. That's exactly what I discussed with Tucker Carson recently. Did you watch?

Peter, Americans are growing tired of this whole COVID power grab.

After 18 months it seems clear to me that these bureaucrats including Dr. Fauci just cannot deal with having to give up the emergency powers the pandemic has given them.

But it's time to stand up and let them know we will not be embracing political theater anymore. We will TRUST THE SCIENCE and get the vaccine if we want to, burn the masks, and reject the vaccine passports plans outright.

Join me today by chipping in to share this message:

clean_body: | Mark Pukita at Patriot Jam! Saturday, August 13 Mark will be having fun and speaking at Patriot Jam on Saturday, August 13 in South Bloomfield. South Bloomfield is about 30 minutes south of Columbus. Come hang out with Mark at the RV. Mark will be speaking sometime between 6 and 7 PM. Learn more and get tickets here: Mark Pukita on the John Fredericks Show Mark was on the John Fredericks Radio Show from Virginia on Tuesday. Pukita and Fredericks discussed the 2020 election, voting integrity, the "bipartisan" infrastructure bill, the US Senate race in Ohio, and more. The interview is available on YouTube () and Facebook (). Make Fairs Great Again: August 6, 7, 8 Mark will be on another fair tour on August 6, 7, 8. If you can help please let Bob Nicholson (bob@mark4ohio.com) know. Tell your friends to stop out and see Mark. Mark will be visiting the following locations: Friday, August 6 Pike County Fair from 10am – 12pm Gallia County Fair from 1pm – 3pm Athens County Fair from 4pm – 6pm Saturday, August 7 Columbiana County Fair from 10am – 12pm Medina County Fair from 2pm – 4pm Wood County Fair from 7pm – 9pm Sunday, August 8 Champaign County Fair from 11am to 1pm Dublin Ohio Irish Festival from 3pm to 5pm A sharable Facebook post is here: | Mark Pukita for US Senate 2022 Committee, 4467 Donegal Cliffs Drive, Dublin, Ohio 43107, USA, (614) 946-0949

name: Mayor John Cranley
subject: Ohio’s comeback story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
Take my survey now and tell me what matters most to you. | Friends – Cincinnati’s comeback story was possible because I started out listening to every voice I could. To make real, positive change in our city, I had to understand what people needed and how I could deliver it to them. **That’s how we reduced the city’s poverty rate by 30%, raised the city worker wage to $15 an hour, and that’s how we’ll be fully carbon neutral by 2022.** **I need your help to create the roadmap to a stronger Ohio, friend.** I need your input on everything from the future of Ohio’s infrastructure to our healthcare system. **[Take our issues survey now to let us know which policies are important to you>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33496585/299056854/543126943?contactdata=CbIxNo19nRQLDiPSfK94oqrdbKstw2m6NU4gH110OXlSxIhzJhDT81RKH8FDKUhi%2FFxa81KvAC%2FmQrckDldNm1rOXVC5EuNdz69KvJKVohk45AOCr0uRTNa%2FS6%2Fio5afV9jiaiKou1nRLvtZOYz69Q%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRjMmEwOC0yNWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mrG1zaqcBGR0UZt0JtMIZ1PKFsarIhU1gnEHgWW0z8=&emci=be51fbda-9dda-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=35dc2a08-25f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)** **[Take the Survey>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33496586/299056856/543126943?contactdata=CbIxNo19nRQLDiPSfK94oqrdbKstw2m6NU4gH110OXlSxIhzJhDT81RKH8FDKUhi%2FFxa81KvAC%2FmQrckDldNm1rOXVC5EuNdz69KvJKVohk45AOCr0uRTNa%2FS6%2Fio5afV9jiaiKou1nRLvtZOYz69Q%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWRjMmEwOC0yNWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3mrG1zaqcBGR0UZt0JtMIZ1PKFsarIhU1gnEHgWW0z8=&emci=be51fbda-9dda-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=35dc2a08-25f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=22604289)** **I have a plan for Ohio, but I need to hear from you to build the best road forward for all Ohioans.** We are all in this together, and your experiences, challenges, and vision for the future matter to me. Team,

The January 6 investigation is underway, and the leaders of this committee are promising a thorough investigation into this attack on our democracy.

Last week, members of law enforcement who served on that day shared their experiences with the commission. Through their testimony, we learned the details about the horrors that they faced, but there's still more to be uncovered.

We know that several congressional Republicans had contact with Donald Trump either on January 6 or in the days prior. Their testimony is crucial to uncovering the truth about who's responsible for the attack, but we know that many of them won't take the stand voluntarily.

So we have a quick question for you, team:

Sen. Toomey thinks we should just forget about that time white nationalists tried to overthrow the government.

Please, Sen. Toomey, just sit down.

name: Jay Jones
subject: Meet Our Moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Meet Our Moment
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/QRotSBYH04CFnhYRlgVfrTDMm7ov6vLFcywZVJFjy3E=/wh5aYG6W-8q5NfjGy4m5DZc-p4cbQoae5AZHPrLPVJk=)**
---
Friend -- **Today, I 'm proud to share that I'm launching [Meet Our Moment](https://act.myngp.com/el/QRotSBYH04CFnhYRlgVfrTDMm7ov6vLFcywZVJFjy3E=/4NgqfYHSmMb5zjWi8AO4sN6SD9dlR7w1RndJjaoWA2Q=), a project aimed at recruiting and training minority Democratic candidates to run for and win state and local offices in the Commonwealth through the election cycles in 2022, 2023, and beyond.** State and local offices have an outsized impact on our daily lives, and it is critical that our public officials reflect the ever-increasing diversity of Virginia as we enter this new Virginia decade. It's time for us to meet our moment and create the change we seek by rolling up our sleeves and growing the bench of diverse candidates to run for and win offices around Virginia. I'm committed to providing all the tools necessary for people to get off the sidelines and into the political arena, because our future depends on it. [**Please consider making a contribution of $25 or more today to become a founding donor toward our efforts to create the change we seek.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/QRotSBYH04CFnhYRlgVfrTDMm7ov6vLFcywZVJFjy3E=/X5NH7_zyIrCFOiuvkRK6mtdhzJugScoYFaZc5tYVh30=) [****](https://act.myngp.com/el/QRotSBYH04CFnhYRlgVfrTDMm7ov6vLFcywZVJFjy3E=/X5NH7_zyIrCFOiuvkRK6mtdhzJugScoYFaZc5tYVh30=) \- Jay P.S. ---

Peter,
For over a decade, Republicans have blocked Medicaid expansion to the more than 500,000 North Carolinians who need it. **Now, it’s never been more important to make sure our people have access to the care they need.**
Once again, COVID-19 cases are surging here in North Carolina and across the country.
Once again, far too many North Carolinians who get sick won’t be able to afford the care they need.
A year and a half into the greatest public health crisis in a century, there’s never been a more critical moment to ensure that no one has to choose between visiting the doctor and putting food on the table — or to affirm that health care access shouldn’t be a partisan issue.
**We have to do everything in our power to keep our communities safe and well,** but Republicans in Raleigh remain committed to playing partisan games and blocking our Medicaid expansion.
**[Roy will keep pushing to expand Medicaid in North Carolina, but he can’t do it alone. Add your name to our petition right now to tell the GOP that you demand a Medicaid expansion>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33507941/299087164/456964787?source=em_RC_PET_Healthcare_080421_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDQzOGYwZS0zNWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQODjgIhyDbE2UwMYajnPTE0SPxPfjzP9ekmOhTOfIc=&emci=913b98f0-72f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=bd438f0e-35f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks,
Team Cooper

name: Mary Vought
subject: Border Backstory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

The crisis on our Southern border is Joe Biden's
fault.

▶︎ It was his decision to stop building
President Trump's wall.

▶︎ It was his open-borders rhetoric that
encouraged migrants and coyotes to head north.

▶︎ It was his catch-and-release policy that
flooded border states with undocumented migrants.

But Biden had help.

You already know about Vice President Kamala Harris
refusing to visit the border as women and children are abused,
people drown in the Rio Grande, and violent criminals sneak into
our country.

And you may also know about Homeland Security
Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas' career of ethical lapses and
open-borders fanaticism.

But you may not have known that SIX Republican
senators (aka RINOs) voted to confirm Mayorkas to his job.

Click here to help elect true conservatives who will
fight Joe Biden's open-borders disaster!

The media and establishment call this
"bipartisanship," but it's really just negligence.

The Left - Biden, Harris, Mayorkas, and the rest -
want the border crisis. They want illegal immigrants to overwhelm
the Border Patrol. They want to let illegals into the country
without even so much as a court date. They don't appear to care
how many people die, how many women are assaulted, how many
children are trafficked, or how many millions of dollars the
coyotes produce for Mexican drug cartels.
All that matters to them is erasing the border.

This crisis is the Democrats' fault, but on the
confirmation of Mayorkas, establishment Republicans helped them.

That's why we need the Senate Conservatives Fund.

Help SCF take back the Senate from liberals in both
parties!

In 2022, we need Republicans to retake the U.S.
Senate to check President Biden's woke extremism - on immigration
and everything else. But just any Republican isn't good enough.
To win this fight, we need genuine conservatives in the Senate
who are ready to take on the establishment, the media, and The
Swamp.

Like you, SCF isn't controlled by special interests
or Republican Party bosses - we're patriots! Next year, many
establishment Republican Senators are retiring. Our mission is
not to "hold" those seats for the GOP, but to "win" them for
America - by nominating and electing true conservatives in those
crucial Republican primary elections.

▶︎ In Alabama, SCF has endorsed Rep. Mo Brooks,
one of the toughest conservatives in the House, to replace
retiring Sen. Richard Shelby.

▶︎ In Ohio, SCF has endorsed proven conservative
Josh Mandel to replace retiring Sen. Rob Portman. Portman was one
of the six Republicans who voted for Mayorkas - exactly the kind
of appeaser we need to replace with a fighter.

▶︎ And in North Carolina, where moderate
Republican Sen. Richard Burr is retiring, SCF stands with Rep.
Ted Budd - a member of the House Freedom Caucus who has spent
years fighting for conservative principles against the Left.

Click here to help SCF build a conservative Senate.
These primaries are going to be as important as the November
elections. In each one, the GOP establishment is backing
moderates with millions of corporate dollars. Only grassroots
conservatives like you can meet this challenge. We need your help
in these races. To seal the border, build the wall, defund
Critical Race Theory, protect girls' bathrooms and sports, and
stop Joe Biden's runaway inflation. We have to send a signal NOW
that conservatives are ready for these fights. Please join us in
supporting conservative candidates. The fight for our future
starts today!

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
SENATECONSERVATIVES.COM

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33509188/299092920/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzOGVkOC0zOGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxndQxKusseMDRNFGbwfzEoZlXwwCUOgXukkXPhNltE=)

| | Peter, Protecting our democracy means defeating Representatives who turn their back on democracy, deny science amid a deadly pandemic, and weaponize hatred for political gain. I’m running to unseat Madison Cawthorn, who has spent his time cozying up to dangerous far-right radicals instead of working for the people of North Carolina’s 11th District. There are a select few Radical Right members of Congress who represent the worst of the worst -- who openly embrace conspiracy theories and regularly spew dangerous rhetoric. Madison Cawthorn has made more national headlines, but there’s another far-right leader who you might not know as well: Andy Harris of Maryland’s First District. He tried to smuggle a gun onto the House floor, nearly picked a fistfight in Congress, and voted against honoring the Capitol police officers who protected his life on January 6th. Luckily, my friend Heather Mizeur is running a strong grassroots campaign against him -- and we’re teaming up to defeat these guys. Cawthorn and Harris are dangerous and well-funded, but Heather and I have the power to unseat them in 2022 with your help. [**Peter, please click here to split a donation between our campaigns. We’re both going up against top Trump seditionists with lots of cash on hand, so every donation is a big help as we expand our grassroots campaigns!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33509189/299092921/-1826773097?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210804_FR_MizeurSplit_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzOGVkOC0zOGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxndQxKusseMDRNFGbwfzEoZlXwwCUOgXukkXPhNltE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33509190/299092922/-1826773097?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210804_FR_MizeurSplit_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzOGVkOC0zOGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxndQxKusseMDRNFGbwfzEoZlXwwCUOgXukkXPhNltE=) Both Heather and I understand the importance of running policy-based grassroots campaigns that treat voters as partners. We’re committed to talking with voters in every corner of our districts, listening deeply, and leading with our records of results. Heather has been a champion for our values her entire career. She’s been a Maryland state legislator, a non-profit leader, a policy advisor, and a farmer, and now, she’s ready to go to Congress to bring decency and compassionate leadership back to Washington. Heather practices a politics deeply rooted in dignified, heart-centered, collaborative leadership, and smart, innovative policy thinking. She’s the kind of representative our country needs to rise up and meet the big challenges we face together. Andy Harris, on the other hand, is more interested in siding with seditionists than defending our democracy. [**All of us need to come together in order to defeat top Trump loyalists across the map. Any amount helps as Heather and I expand our grassroots campaigns to bring dignified leadership to Congress!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33509191/299092923/-1826773097?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210804_FR_MizeurSplit_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzOGVkOC0zOGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxndQxKusseMDRNFGbwfzEoZlXwwCUOgXukkXPhNltE=) | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33509192/299092924/-1826773097?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210804_FR_MizeurSplit_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWYzOGVkOC0zOGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UxndQxKusseMDRNFGbwfzEoZlXwwCUOgXukkXPhNltE=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, Protecting our democracy means defeating Representatives who turn their back on democracy, deny science amid a deadly pandemic, and weaponize hatred for political gain. I’m running to unseat Madison Cawthorn, who has spent his time cozying up to dangerous far-right radicals instead of working for the people of North Carolina’s 11th District. There are a select few Radical Right members of Congress who represent the worst of the worst -- who openly embrace conspiracy theories and regularly spew dangerous rhetoric. Madison Cawthorn has made more national headlines, but there’s another far-right leader who you might not know as well: Andy Harris of Maryland’s First District. He tried to smuggle a gun onto the House floor, nearly picked a fistfight in Congress, and voted against honoring the Capitol police officers who protected his life on January 6th. Luckily, my friend Heather Mizeur is running a strong grassroots campaign against him -- and we’re teaming up to defeat these guys. Cawthorn and Harris are dangerous and well-funded, but Heather and I have the power to unseat them in 2022 with your help. = = Both Heather and I understand the importance of running policy-based grassroots campaigns that treat voters as partners. We’re committed to talking with voters in every corner of our districts, listening deeply, and leading with our records of results. Heather has been a champion for our values her entire career. She’s been a Maryland state legislator, a non-profit leader, a policy advisor, and a farmer, and now, she’s ready to go to Congress to bring decency and compassionate leadership back to Washington. Heather practices a politics deeply rooted in dignified, heart-centered, collaborative leadership, and smart, innovative policy thinking. She’s the kind of representative our country needs to rise up and meet the big challenges we face together. Andy Harris, on the other hand, is more interested in siding with seditionists than defending our democracy. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude, Jasmine Beach-Ferrara = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

name: Mark Herring
subject: My priorities this special legislative session

It was grassroots Democrats like you that put in the extra effort to help flip the Senate earlier this year. Your generous support helped Democrats flip Arizona, Colorado, and both Senate seats in Georgia and do the unthinkable: **defeat Mitch McConnell’s right-wing megadonor network.** Our Democratic Senate majority gives us an incredible opportunity to pass critical legislation for families everywhere — and we’ve wasted no time getting to work. **But one of the most important things we need to do right now is make sure we don’t lose a single seat, otherwise we give McConnell control once again.** Senate Democrats are maintaining the slimmest majority possible, and McConnell knows that. If we lose even one Democratic incumbent, you might as well kiss the Biden-Harris agenda goodbye. Back in 2014, I remember the heartbreaking losses we experienced in the Senate. Soon after, we watched in disbelief as Republicans blocked President Obama every chance they got. We cannot go back — and that’s where you come in. Defend the Senate is one of the leading organizations powering Democrats in battleground states across the country. They’re on the front lines protecting people like Catherine Cortez Masto and Rev. Raphael Warnock. **I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help keep up our efforts? Senate Democrats are maintaining the slimmest majority possible, and McConnell knows that. If we lose even one Democratic incumbent, you might as well kiss the Biden-Harris agenda goodbye. Back in 2014, I remember the heartbreaking losses we experienced in the Senate. Soon after, we watched in disbelief as Republicans blocked President Obama every chance they got. We cannot go back — and that’s where you come in. Defend the Senate is one of the leading organizations powering Democrats in battleground states across the country. They’re on the front lines protecting people like Catherine Cortez Masto and Rev. Raphael Warnock. I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help keep up our efforts? We can’t let McConnell take over and obstruct our work at every turn. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With your help, Democrats can shock the world again by protecting — and even expanding! — our Senate majority. You can help get the job done. Thanks, James Carville Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: A beautiful 30-by-40 foot swimming pool
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayers
body:
This is NOT my official residence.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210804-2188-header&t=1&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)
The pool at the former Lieutenant Governor’s residence is officially open!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210804-2188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)
Now let me be very clear, Peter. This is NOT my actual residence. I am the only Lieutenant Governor in the history of Pennsylvania to *reject* living in a huge estate with a chef, gardener, and pool paid for by taxpayers. And in late 2019 the Commonwealth divested itself of the property, saving taxpayers as much as $400,000 every year.
Pennsylvania does not owe me or my family a staffed mansion to live in. The supreme honor and privilege of serving as LG is many, many multiples more than enough.
Gisele and I chose to raise our kids and keep our residence, an old car dealership across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill in Braddock, instead.**Still, we have always maintained that if *our* children were welcome to swim in that beautiful 30-by-40 foot pool, so should every other child...**
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210804-2188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)
...So in June 2019, we opened up the pool to the children of Pennsylvania! 😎
Now the pool gets put to good use every summer by public groups and nonprofits. Children with little to no access to a swimming pool can now learn how to swim in a beautiful pool at a historic estate.
The ugly truth is that swimming has a painful legacy of racial segregation. Gisele and I are committed to equity in all spaces. It is our hope that making this pool available to everyone will help end that disparity and allow every kid in Pennsylvania to have a fun + cool summer.
**Equity everywhere is worth fighting for, Peter. And I *promise* that as a United States Senator, I will fight for equity in your community as if it were my very own.**
In order to build the kind of winning campaign that will get us there, we need to raise a lot of money. A big part of that is people like you chipping in. With our July fundraising deadline just around the corner, I have to ask:
[**_Will you please make your first donation to our campaign right now? Every dollar helps send me to the U.S. Senate where I’ll fight like hell for your community just like I fight for mine._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210804-2188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/23973?refcode=em20210804-2188&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)**
Here’s to another great summer,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210804-2188-footer&t=24&refcode2=2188_434096_gRzm0s&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2188%2E434096%2EgRzm0s)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Nina Turner
subject: The journey continues and the fight doesn’t stop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
I want to say this from the bottom of my heart: thank you.
#

On this campaign, we have worked hard to center the needs of the poor, the working poor, the barely middle class, people of color — everyone who’s been marginalized, left out and left behind.
What we set out to do is to give voice to those people in Ohio’s 11th Congressional District who do not have enough to eat, who worry about paying the bills, who yearn for better schools for their kids, who cannot afford their medicines and who struggle every day to keep their heads above water without a lot of hope of getting ahead.
As you know, this campaign did not happen in isolation. It has always been part of a movement of people across this country who want, in the words of the late great Rep. Barbara Jordan, an America as good as its promise.
Those of us fighting for that America here in Ohio, and in every state in this country, have been on a long justice journey through a desert of despair, indifference, inequality and racism.
My friends, we have looked across at the promised land. But for this campaign, this time, we will not cross the river.
Now, our justice journey continues. And I am proud to continue that journey with each and every one of you.
We will continue this journey until every working person earns a living wage, including passing a $15 minimum wage.
We will continue this journey until every person has health care as a right and not a privilege.
We will continue this journey until childrens’ destinies are not determined by their zip code or the color of their skin.
We will continue this journey until we have torn down racism, sexism, homophobia, religious bigotry and every kind of hatred and discrimination.
We will continue this journey until justice is equal for every person in this country.
And this journey will continue until we have ensured that this planet will be habitable for our children and our grandchildren.
So my friends, it is ok to be sad right now. But come tomorrow we must roll up our sleeves and continue the fight to which we are all committed.
**To everyone who gave their time, their talent, and their treasure to this campaign, I want to say this from the bottom of my heart: thank you.**
First, to my beautiful family. You are my pillar and my strength. And thanks to my incredible staff and everyone on Team Turner. All the elected officials who had the courage to stand with us and walk the path of justice. Although I cannot thank everyone, I want to thank my mayor Frank Jackson and City Councilman Blaine Griffin; the members of the state legislative delegation who came out early for us: Senators Yuko, Williams, and Antonio and State Reps. Brent, Howse, Boyd, Robinson, Skindell, and Galonski.
My thanks to all the other mayors and local officials who stood with us, including the Black Elected Officials of Summit County. Thanks to the men and women from the house of labor and to all the progressive organizations across the country, including the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Democracy for America, and our dear friends at Our Revolution. And all the incredible faith leaders who were with us.
And thanks to folks who I have worked with for years who came to Cleveland to testify on my behalf, including Representative Ocasio Cortez, the ever-inspirational Dr. Cornel West, Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison. And my special thanks to my brother, my friend Senator Bernard Sanders.
And finally, thank you again to the tens of thousands of people who volunteered their time and donated their treasure with an average donation of $27.
During this race, we have taken on Wall Street, Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and pretty much every special interest group in Washington, DC.
That struggle does not end now. While this campaign might be over, our movement is not.
I have always believed that change does not come from folks at the top with big titles. Instead, it comes from the ground up.
Our justice journey is not yet over. I promise to keep fighting alongside you to build a better future for ALL of us from the ground on up.
With these hands,
Nina Turner

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---
Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ff1df134-40f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/188867da-44f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODg4NjdkYS00NGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z-oHBQCvMMgROFCqC2ell_1ReAjjXeSCTj9_dma4u_8=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

With these hands, Nina Turner * Paid for by Nina Turner for Us Nina Turner for Us PO Box 91956 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe.

name: Tom
subject: Friend, thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Friend,

I am so grateful for your commitment to our people-powered, progressive campaign. **Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, and my tour across Wisconsin is off to a great start!**

The second leg of the Full Nelson Tour is done, hundreds of miles and many counties later. I have enjoyed getting to know people in each town and learning what issues are most important to them.

This tour represents how I’ve won six times in a red county: by meeting with anybody and everybody — _and with you on my side, I know we can do it again._

As the only candidate in the race packing up my car and setting out on a tour of all 72 counties in Wisconsin, hosting open events with people, _regardless of their political affiliation_ , in their favorite diner, coffee shop, or watering hole, I understand the importance of being a leader for all Wisconsinites, not just the rich and well-connected.

[There are still more than 60 counties to go — and I am looking forward to each and every one of them — but funding a tour to every corner of Wisconsin is not cheap. If you missed the chance to donate before the end of the month, you can still chip in now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33515887/299119304/-628206450?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210804_1_1&refcode2=c9ad077a-4af5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWFkMDc3YS00YWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqxqOoiH0HoZWWdM5aYPiBTpprhg9JmwphKu16pUF_c=) | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33515888/299119305/-628206450?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210804_1_1&refcode2=c9ad077a-4af5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWFkMDc3YS00YWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqxqOoiH0HoZWWdM5aYPiBTpprhg9JmwphKu16pUF_c=)

Tom

Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal, and my tour across Wisconsin is off to a great start! The second leg of the Full Nelson Tour is done, hundreds of miles and many counties later. I have enjoyed getting to know people in each town and learning what issues are most important to them. This tour represents how I’ve won six times in a red county: by meeting with anybody and everybody — and with you on my side, I know we can do it again. name: Chief James Craig
subject: DEAD HEAT in Michigan...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
**NEW POLL SHOWS CHIEF CRAIG IN A DEAD HEAT WITH GRETCHEN WHITMER** [**DONATE NOW
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r) | |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
|
---
Peter,

_**I 'm already TIED in the race with Gretchen Whitmer without a single campaign event, TV Ad, or even a formal announcement.**_

She's in trouble. And there's a good reason why.

More than half of Michiganders think the state is headed in the wrong direction, and 44% of them have a **very** unfavorable opinion of Governor Whitmer.

These numbers don't lie: **we have a unique opportunity to bring a change in leadership to Michigan.**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)

**So why are Michiganders asking me, a long-time police officer, to challenge the governor? **

Let me tell you my story, and perhaps you'll understand why.

My 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order.

See, I grew up right here in Detroit during the '67 riots, watching tanks rolling down these streets. I remember snipers on the roofs.

I was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened.

The police retreated, and let their city burn.

**Since I've been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. We are here to protect our citizens.**

But there's more to the "why?" than that.

When I came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky.

I started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. I made it an example. We mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, we cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)

Then, I went into the city and met with every group I could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do.

So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, _**Detroit did not burn.**_

Leadership - real leadership - matters.

Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite.

No "rules for thee, not for me!"

Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?

Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.

I don't see much of that out there.

**So, I'm opening an exploratory committee to help me think about a run for Governor of Michigan. **

I believe in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why I'm inviting you to be a Lead From the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)

[** LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
Sometimes people are surprised to hear that I'm a Republican.

I grew up a Democrat. But then I watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. I watched as they pushed handouts that increase dependency on the government for political gain.

**And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT my values.**

_**And I'm pretty sure you can guess MY position on "Defund the Police!"**_

I grew up in the church. I was taught to respect my elders, the importance of self-reliance, and the value of hard work. I read the writings of great Americans like Abraham Lincoln, Frederick Douglass, Booker T. Washington and Sojourner Truth.

Looking back on it, my values were always Republican values.

When I was Chief of Police, I didn't broadcast my personal political affiliation. But the truth is, I've been a Republican for a long time.

**And I voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.**

Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters.

And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front, rather than ruling us like a queen.

**Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join me?**
**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**
[**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070438:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070439:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070440:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
[**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070441:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)
_**If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically.**_

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)

Chief James Craig

Former Detroit Police Chief

P.S. I'm not a politician, I'm a police officer. I'm starting this process from scratch. Any amount you can donate to our team today would be much appreciated: **[https://secure.winred.com/james-craig-for-governor-exploratory-committee/action-2662599](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58070437:6X5n8Fl4N:m:1:3253819041:615930B29714B3754C0BD9E29ECA4476:r)**

clean_body: In fact, they’re terrible. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Thank goodness we reached you, Peter. These latest fundraising reports paint a worrisome picture for our fight to reclaim the Senate Majority. We refuse to stand by and do nothing while the Democrats seize a Republican Senate seat. That’s why we’re RACING to send emergency reinforcements to Tim’s campaign to help him before he’s overrun. If you've saved your payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | Tim Scott’s GOP-held Senate Seat is an absolute must-win in the Midterm Elections. But Democrats are making it clear that they’ll do, say, and spend whatever it takes to take it from us. We need every Grassroots Republican to stand up and chip in RIGHT AWAY if we’re going to turn the tide. | Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Our 88 County Tour is Underway!
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyHw57ciJEVcixZuu1m2dqoctJNtxwVWpuWpLcD7t63gEJWAHJacVw2Rp1-1-UrIy1z__7h0ZRPWBrOphleHoKwzWg20BOlGpe04SOPOaGei5odUd0bsttY5ktjftO47rYxA==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==)
---
| Peter,

It has been an extremely exciting week for #TeamGibbons. Our 30 second TV ad launched statewide and our 60 second radio advertisement is airing on conservative radio.
WATCH: ["We Believe" ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH8Ltcu8iwV9L2F13njdkZwQ9I9hkQXEojXJKcQhDWN8SyaQNm57VDXCySwoOCwoMlgdxkYvcffhuQh3ISFwpf1N14LsooOuz_AV0V1FSFTJhfhY7RcJnS1pbJWBSJtHjxQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==)
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH8Ltcu8iwV9L2F13njdkZwQ9I9hkQXEojXJKcQhDWN8SyaQNm57VDXCySwoOCwoMlgdxkYvcffhuQh3ISFwpf1N14LsooOuz_AV0V1FSFTJhfhY7RcJnS1pbJWBSJtHjxQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==)
---
| Additionally, we launched our 88 county tour. Over the next two months I will be in each county across the Buckeye State!
Our tour kicked off close to home with mass at the historic [St. Steven's Church](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH5aRI2XsAj3bCTPRgOj9r800m8BN9L7FFPRINQ7lknseI3cDcyE6_2czQU0iffxcdiuacmZYAWgDziW9GFa1gXJCiDmFZMj71HE6qZ0kb1-hdH33dLG9HtRYRNbvwWgyu1tWSXOHGEB4mEpRvJNPn8tNGToVaGnf3g==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==) in Cleveland.
I then headed to Portage County for their summer GOP picnic.
---
|
---
| Next, we went to Bill's Donuts in Centerville, Ohio. Bill's has been making donuts for over 60 years and it is easy to understand how they stay in business. They simply make great donuts (I promise I only had one)! While in Southwest Ohio we also stopped in [Butler ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH5aRI2XsAj3b3d2C3oZ9E4jCXlKuQ23hofbp3TKfbdePD0yqz1ZKigxeJxAl-JBCOHhaPYYi5Xa-TJaawW5lW_ueDUP6U4s2b-v5wqrGJKYnpOlRq93dBugTFJncvdQK_92uB1KZrOdi3psAnOqto_ICn25ZUEvvlQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==)and [Hamilton](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH5aRI2XsAj3bHu330lAZ89WATKqg-mSa4SMjk1RsI0rL2kpQ8I-xnbyxgjMaalIW6Lu8ZcZ0xYKcEqRvU3TQPKE3lMrnzPdl0pPz2mV2KhblO4XjYv9vsMxPNb7hAxzwlWaA2Hkye2mFEwdr77hOLdTooXA3SZwfeQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==) Counties as well.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Yesterday, I was in central Ohio meeting with [restaurant](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH5aRI2XsAj3b_PAHgGG-Nd2icEnxEamo3fFFe8GU6htcsN7X7VrbF8-I7_ecEMzOk2uqogfPYjrE3S7j_Eq-umb9HqQPAWY40O9gaTOCV_1ADXYgfyGlr5a5_KO9S8xuZ88c4pQcvbai9AiKYa1nuBTpZYPJsBVXZQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==) [owners](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-tqLBIU_6nbEwB5nuobOdW7zGoq9kovbmPFjRRFivSbafMHfKRpyH5aRI2XsAj3bx2MYF2cwzAzKjxaSzjzHzxv9XpILYNe38ZESGtuvFzs6RxRE0viVDXjudLMN125NkK1mXUam7YRH86Bl6ao-WmcRh4SjEGBPYnHOg8WN-HHGmZdu-Yd6BnOOsMMG1tCqT7fbP_H6lnoTuy_RDLsQFQ==&c=emLOL9RPosYFojjo69FCn5BTk9oUNNH_fVrzcqVPKSmKRSsO5lqSDQ==&ch=Y1a859W8HIZvqKFj3zgbClgz0nYQ2irn_EdiVhJ-tsEqgO6VVWnpVA==) to discuss economic policies and reopening after the pandemic.
I also sat down with NBC 4 in Columbus to discuss my race. If you live in the area check out my interview this Sunday on The Spectrum!
---
|
---
| If you have suggestions on where we should stop, let me know, Diane and I would love to check it out!
See you on the trail,
---
| Mike Gibbons Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: Senator Morse says NO to Biden tax hikes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Senate Republican PAC, Chuck Morse Chairman
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzQ0ODk5ODM3NTk1MjI3Njc3JmM9bjF4OCZlPTE5MjgmYj02Nzc4NzczNTgmZD1oMmg2YTFj.5nOyOoLq7FwtG-SEvAsY115O900kvzvG4BLuzZy6ZuM)
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzQ0ODk5ODM3NTk1MjI3Njc3JmM9bjF4OCZlPTE5MjgmYj02Nzc4NzczNjEmZD1hOXAxcDZk.sbR72AAPUJM5fo_9dakcyIixiYY0UK3JRkEPjJ-1uHk)
---
---
| |
---
| Friends, ICYMI: This past week, NH Democrats [renewed their push for the higher taxes](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzQ0ODk5ODM3NTk1MjI3Njc3JmM9bjF4OCZlPTE5MjgmYj02Nzc4NzczNjQmZD1zMWgzeTl3.sEL-j5Un4j4yvhpvrNnw9tpdGarPLDR8ThxJVA56nLE) promised by the Biden Administration. **NH Democrats are actually suggesting that Granite Staters _want_ to pay higher taxes.** It's almost as if they learned nothing from their 2020 state election losses! Luckily, your **New Hampshire Senate Republicans are fighting back against their job-killing tax proposals**. Senate President Chuck Morse has been all over the local news opposing any higher taxes in the Granite State. See some of his statements below:
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| “I’m concerned that New Hampshire Senate Democrats are looking to D.C. for inspiration on tax policy. Are they so tone deaf that they can't understand that hardworking New Hampshire families and small businesses do not want more taxes?"
\- Senate President Chuck Morse
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
| “It’s no surprise that New Hampshire Senate Democrats opposed the frugal conservative state budget that cut taxes for everyone and addressed our state's needs and priorities without a sales or income tax. The Democrats' unquenchable thirst to spend money, raise taxes and create more government is causing prices to skyrocket on everything from food to gas and put our economy on the brink of crippling inflation.” \- Senate President Chuck Morse
---
---
| |
---
| *Follow more from Senate President Chuck Morse on [his Facebook page](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzQ0ODk5ODM3NTk1MjI3Njc3JmM9bjF4OCZlPTE5MjgmYj02Nzc4NzczNjcmZD15M3E2cThl.cc7EndoiWfsIM23UEPcfgq00bPsbOogofoAHQq0wYs4)!

---
---
| |
---
|
---

body:
Enough is enough. It’s time for action... [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=4c4c78d82b074863adf0977b13094f09&_e=8_bJe-Ov8Vne-3ewFI4Od8vJ-GnxUFYfLCOHmFoBbDe8ilLkAWR9zIwjGrZAAGmBLdVXqmJMNvAPfVHQtMsTdvt050zfR9pm8jqEyUZwurFmQTkuP68y7DtNQOxELp_rkmgPopHWjjPUOYrNV7OlgFaugBoC5e7_elrkklVokPi75RIcX2a6tt5TLDpA2nmpJ0LXicOZNH5vFr7ZCrj8JIpIziIRodZqXkEX8MPxLk9YIIL6jImsr3TdVr_zAqQnhVMoVB39z62_Ka0N2oLwToVLxeA0sKSouLInkw7aI_mBibSS-GodFbKA8D9pO9E1D0tksUu-JuCeKpMDf_CRNMYjPNrcYPYPY-GA8gmqdep1s3pXYrLZqRhRJm0wjojn3u6Iwy6gYw83oWTbRJUO4ws4fYNKobcFsVZjpIm107wOBvqHqkr5GbyIQYSxifAyIp6JkS1BmeLDihe7bPNGUNOLvvFyQcr9zq-evSrnvINJZASnWWRM-WP5qMnjO03-) | |

**_FIRST_** , Governor Cuomo put COVID infected patients back into nursing homes and attempted to cover it up.

**_THEN_** , the NY Democrats pretended for the media that they would check his power but failed to actually hold him accountable.

**_NOW_** , the New York Attorney General has corroborated the harassment allegations against Andrew Cuomo.

**Enough is enough. It’s time for action. **

**GOVERNOR ANDREW CUOMO** _**MUST RESIGN OR BE IMPEACHED!**_

If Governor Cuomo doesn’t resign, then he must be impeached. There’s no other option. _**And we must hold Democrats' feet to the fire to ensure it’s done.**_

_[**Peter, will you fund my effort to ensure CUOMO IS IMPEACHED by rushing a few dollars now?**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=4c4c78d82b074863adf0977b13094f09&_e=8_bJe-Ov8Vne-3ewFI4Od8vJ-GnxUFYfLCOHmFoBbDe8ilLkAWR9zIwjGrZAAGmBLdVXqmJMNvAPfVHQtMsTdvt050zfR9pm8jqEyUZwurFmQTkuP68y7DtNQOxELp_rkmgPopHWjjPUOYrNV7OlgFaugBoC5e7_elrkklVokPi75RIcX2a6tt5TLDpA2nmpJ0LXicOZNH5vFr7ZCrj8JIpIziIRodZqXkEX8MPxLk9YIIL6jImsr3TdVr_zAqQnhVMoVB39z62_Ka0N2oLwToVLxeA0sKSouLInkw7aI_kn72OgXNcy2Px-WujuvfGvdIGuT5xmBUl683X_4XrJu8pXR2TTm69kjcCkas4hX4qwZYde3NLttQp9eJnFPfDsamXpR_6BMv7GneQzBqfsEIY9A-buEqWd11c9zDTwkDeN-Dt9VsUCTMOlT-ZnaUBe8xfffhjl1jloRbpKsAI4lg2sxeyH21e0gVzShMjNevvDOj8HqnH8f7nzibbCzL6L)_
[**IMPEACH ANDREW CUOMO**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=4c4c78d82b074863adf0977b13094f09&_e=8_bJe-Ov8Vne-3ewFI4Od8vJ-GnxUFYfLCOHmFoBbDe8ilLkAWR9zIwjGrZAAGmBLdVXqmJMNvAPfVHQtMsTdvt050zfR9pm8jqEyUZwurFmQTkuP68y7DtNQOxELp_rkmgPopHWjjPUOYrNV7OlgFaugBoC5e7_elrkklVokPi75RIcX2a6tt5TLDpA2nmpJ0LXicOZNH5vFr7ZCrj8JIpIziIRodZqXkEX8MPxLk9YIIL6jImsr3TdVr_zAqQnhVMoVB39z62_Ka0N2oLwToVLxeA0sKSouLInkw7aI_nxGyKITFZ9rY9yeJAZ4Q-981HCrV_35GjBP48l5vD90OncUSUFWcWDciAWL58PeDmZW6Gpnfqwvrzy1-Is29ROd-Wge0eHylFTnnRW7LnhuWsmKPGLegSsS6GZobXrHJ3TtHSuROVLUvaE4TGOMQAodaMGt--ld0cUH6cflQvYxeV2iowrECvhLfjwW2gMtTx4qSyBUXgDnr-uvmgECio-)
Peter, we can’t let up the pressure against Governor Cuomo. Our time to strike is now to finally get him out of office for his tenure of corruption.
**_ _**
He must be held accountable for everything he’s done, and impeachment is the beginning of that.
**_ _**
_[**Keep the pressure against Governor Cuomo going by supporting my call for Impeachment NOW >>**](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=4c4c78d82b074863adf0977b13094f09&_e=8_bJe-Ov8Vne-3ewFI4Od8vJ-GnxUFYfLCOHmFoBbDe8ilLkAWR9zIwjGrZAAGmBLdVXqmJMNvAPfVHQtMsTdvt050zfR9pm8jqEyUZwurFmQTkuP68y7DtNQOxELp_rkmgPopHWjjPUOYrNV7OlgFaugBoC5e7_elrkklVokPi75RIcX2a6tt5TLDpA2nmpJ0LXicOZNH5vFr7ZCrj8JIpIziIRodZqXkEX8MPxLk9YIIL6jImsr3TdVr_zAqQnhVMoVB39z62_Ka0N2oLwToVLxeA0sKSouLInkw7aI_nRuiP6f2c8N9hLs7pzgo2QaHeQIQ4NYTk980InSppM-WxK0JvN_4W0gLjvT9-2akJl6Z9hpOsCKWcuyX0mBz7CZtwGVPu0Rr8_iPWdUPbxMB97-pU6i22mHEC6L-0j2g20Jc42AwQ2PI15LClrCxNW_pJRyAo8ZzmJl_jUVhYp8R1XBeBAUsQMrMSULLt7jS-ueo7VvZvp1_kFSarP2cjd)_
**_ _**
Thank you,
Andrew Garbarino

---
| Dear Friend, The Mississippi Center for Public Policy has just published a bombshell report on top public sector pay. Our report reveals how:
* Mississippi’s State Superintendent for Public Education earns $300,000 per year, making her one of the highest paid State Superintendents in America.
* Dozens of district education bureaucrats are paid more than the State Governor ($122,160 per year), who does not even rank in the top fifty highest paid officials.
* Education bureaucrats are some of the highest paid officials – despite presiding over some of the worst education outcomes.
* The average salary of the 24 School District Superintendents on the list is $175,000 – more than the Chief Justice of the State Supreme Court earns.

---
|
---
|
* Some of the WORST performing school districts pay education bureaucrats the HIGHEST salaries.
* Capping all School District Superintendent pay below what the Governor earns would produce taxpayer savings of $2 million a year, enough to pay for 50 additional teachers.

For years, we have been told that poor education outcomes were a consequence of underfunding. So how come there is enough money to pay soaring salaries to bureaucrats?

The Fat Cat report suggests that the problem is a chronic lack of public accountability – which explains more soaring salaries and poor education standards.

Our report makes a series of recommendations to ensure meaningful oversight of public sector bosses. [READ OUR FAT CAT REPORT HERE.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=02e95bc410&e=5703353baa)

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

Ps. Our policy report in Mississippi has attracted national attention. Have a click on some of the links below to watch what Fox News and others had to say ....

|

name: Team Schrier
subject: Kim introduced a bill to lower health care costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a doctor, Kim knows that too many people put off going to the doctor's office because they're worried about the cost. That's why she's made lowering the cost of health care a top priority of hers in Congress to ensure everyone has access to the care they need, when they need it. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33519681/299133124/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJjZDgyZC01NmY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cSw7MHIkgltdZ8-2IuvkwTkk7iNHnW4woae3dRh6D8=&emci=ef46b977-95f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dc2cd82d-56f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

As a doctor, Kim knows that too many people put off going to the doctor's office because they're worried about the cost. That's why she's made lowering the cost of health care a top priority of hers in Congress to ensure everyone has access to the care they need, when they need it.

**Kim recently introduced the Capping Costs for Consumers Act -- a bill that will reduce health co-pays and deductibles for millions of families.** This bill will encourage more folks to get health care coverage and save families in Washington's 8th District an average of $2,500 in out-of-pocket costs.

As we continue to face the COVID-19 pandemic, access to quality, affordable health care has never been more important. Kim's bill is an important step in the right direction to ensuring that everyone can get the care they need without worrying about the expense.

**Kim will always fight in Congress to lower the cost of health care, but she needs to know you have her back.[Add your name right away to show your support for Kim's bill to lower the cost of health care >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33519688/299133132/762135124?gpsid=8_30_20035&ms=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&refcode=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&utm_campaign=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJjZDgyZC01NmY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cSw7MHIkgltdZ8-2IuvkwTkk7iNHnW4woae3dRh6D8=&emci=ef46b977-95f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dc2cd82d-56f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33519689/299133182/762135124?gpsid=8_30_20035&ms=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&refcode=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&utm_campaign=em21_210804_hcbill_adv_gq_act__ts&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzJjZDgyZC01NmY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0cSw7MHIkgltdZ8-2IuvkwTkk7iNHnW4woae3dRh6D8=&emci=ef46b977-95f4-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=dc2cd82d-56f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)

name: Team Padilla
subject: Abortion Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Today, a majority of Americans support access to a safe and legal abortion affirmed by _Roe v. Wade._
So why is the right to an abortion under threat? Because a right-wing minority in this country has pushed for a judiciary that is hostile to our basic rights. And right now, the Supreme Court is setting up to either undercut Roe or to overturn it altogether.
[**It’s clear that our slim Senate majority is the last line of defense for abortion rights in America today. Will you add your name and tell Congress it’s time to step up and protect the right to a safe and legal abortion?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Roe-v-Wade-Petition/?source=em210804-1-subs&t=1&akid=215%2E159979%2E3EvfIF)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Roe-v-Wade-Petition/?source=em210804-1-subs&t=2&akid=215%2E159979%2E3EvfIF)**
Those that seek to reverse _Roe vs. Wade_ need to be reminded that a strong majority of Americans support reproductive freedom.
Because abortion is basic health care — plain and simple. In fact, one in four women will access an abortion in their lifetime. It’s one of the safest and most common medical procedures out there.
But Republicans want to control every part of women’s health. They will attack groups like Planned Parenthood and try to deny mothers paid leave.
That’s why it’s up to us to remind Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court that EVERY woman has the right to choose what is right for her.
[**So before you go, will you add your name and join Alex to tell Congress it’s time to step up and protect the right to a safe and legal abortion?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Roe-v-Wade-Petition/?source=em210804-1-subs&t=3&akid=215%2E159979%2E3EvfIF)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Roe-v-Wade-Petition/?source=em210804-1-subs&t=4&akid=215%2E159979%2E3EvfIF)**
Thank you for speaking up, and for doing your part.
Together,
Team Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=215%2E159979%2E3EvfIF)

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: Eviction protections reinstated! (TIME Magazine)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Yesterday was a big win for tenants, but there’s so much more work to do.
#
Big update, Peter: The White House issued NEW eviction protections yesterday to keep millions of renters and families in their homes.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-515&t=1&refcode2=515_420207_xlpG7B&akid=515%2E420207%2ExlpG7B)
This simply wouldn’t have happened without the _relentless_ advocacy of Cori Bush, Pramila’s leadership on the issue, and the nonstop pressure of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. Our movement made this a reality.
**_Yet, there’s still so much more work left to do during this crisis._**
Congress MUST find a longer term solution to the eviction crisis. When the pandemic eviction protections end, millions will likely still face eviction. At least tens of thousands of people have already been evicted during the pandemic, despite the nationwide protections in place. And the rental relief programs have been extremely difficult for many families to access.
We need to keep folks in their homes, not allow corporate landlords and their PACs to run out the clock. The wave of evictions still awaits if we don’t take action — and our push to guarantee housing as a human right is more important than ever.
[**Pramila is fighting to keep people in their homes. Can you support her push to win historic aid to tenants and ensure housing is a human right? We’ve proven advocacy works — now chip in $3 today and fuel our continued fight to transform housing in this country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=515_420207_xlpG7B&akid=515%2E420207%2ExlpG7B)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-515&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=515_420207_xlpG7B&akid=515%2E420207%2ExlpG7B)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210804-515-footer&t=22&refcode2=515_420207_xlpG7B&akid=515%2E420207%2ExlpG7B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: where things stand:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
We can't win if Rubio's big-money Republican donors outspend us, and right now, he's got a lot more cash in the bank than me. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUpV7_LK8Y2NGhpFsdRRl1BhqOQX8VrJYkhioi7QouF4WmX19dmwFM0ttSTBcwr9XPa6nc3FArkWB5XCQsHDQIN6OxiENDJxGTzarDzyt1QZfWVxxbXXz1AdUGF-45xUDv84myfWBPxBv87AKAGioEqLSPPkgI_MliSMUJb8Y6bVnhomWbUkMVaCEXTJmNAnGfZ6bHWYulVYswBeztkauV5N2t5_brcYhl__a15qCGrZlxSvMKEPCB8qX48IxWk41-OE0ViHnu0g-dcOOGDS5QI/3e6/i0GuNDdoTbKHl1smhidKOQ/h0/oWxcGSWK_dB_PziXrzzersZb38LGUPd2KMdOBbMkvuU)
I'm sorry to reach out like this again, Derek, **but my finance team just let me know I should send another urgent email to ask for a donation of $25 or more to help me make up my fundraising shortfall.** Here's where things stand:

Even though CNN recently increased my chances of flipping Florida blue, Marco Rubio just raised a massive $4 million – every dollar of which he can use to attack me and destroy our momentum. And Derek, that is only the beginning: experts are predicting this could be the most expensive U.S. Senate race ever.

I can't win if Rubio's big-money Republican donors outspend me, and right now, Rubio's got a lot more cash in the bank than me – cash that can make all the difference in a race that could be decided by as little as 0.12 percentage points. That's why I must keep hitting goals. But with time running out, I'm still $12,000 short on my current goal push.

**I know I've asked a lot lately – it's not my favorite, but it's necessary to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority. And I need you to donate right now because I'm falling short of my goal, Derek.**

[**This is vital: please, can you split a donation of $25 or more right now – whatever you can spare – between my campaign and Common Good VA so that we can defeat Marco Rubio? Every dollar you send will go toward stopping Rubio and protecting our Senate majority!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUpV7_LK8Y2NGhpFsdRRl1D1Uakow684jlT1t6Zu026alr9udsSmwkvlVcfJ40lIOh8rEx4VTx9uiaILPgSO8u9IkdAsRY5MtLiUSPwhuKzWFpj3ltqcVEQsWxcpcHVRs_Dd8Ov6MUhATcl_e_W8tkUtHH1ZJGP_fJJ8qWfYqMe7uQl_3TTwpe6oMJjwc7ZgV-Vgapvvv7VJ6QsJaFf0uJV8cTSUUZYlJthV_784-j3B9pC3RtNnj5amSzV-fDrbJychBsPiysdq__qw7OLzlp8/3e6/i0GuNDdoTbKHl1smhidKOQ/h1/RndQt02HXrmaH-2zq79c-6baYiKU1rXe-kHOIAuSnt0) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIQo2x_vsp_vfK0Equ4XU0Zj1O-EYMjJWEz-MyBhP4_8uQO3m8OKpOKc6_VTOHd2UP33LaXhv1sPfp2GVYWUlTS-aYUmZXzgxT26RLoYHkRX7ElnQwFDfhttB6w7wQS9AETq2SU9rhMCmLRhsItvRkdHngWdoV5H4a9RhyvN13IskvPmx99aJuVueNQBOOjXjETQnHzIxuZpUaJw8WMA0RwRIs0MO8dySbx-RiBlpcJ4NCiXGC4PMfYRE1QTq8GOJIJr1jWfDHRj9y1G7cGgl_5Y/3e6/i0GuNDdoTbKHl1smhidKOQ/h2/WWwrAqqpsDzAJ3P3dhnHXGyLIyUnxq26IvnhNLCa-hE)

clean_body: We can't win if Rubio's big-money Republican donors outspend us, and right now, he's got a lot more cash in the bank than me. | | | I'm sorry to reach out like this again, Derek, but my finance team just let me know I should send another urgent email to ask for a donation of $25 or more to help me make up my fundraising shortfall. Here's where things stand: Even though CNN recently increased my chances of flipping Florida blue, Marco Rubio just raised a massive $4 million – every dollar of which he can use to attack me and destroy our momentum. And Derek, that is only the beginning: experts are predicting this could be the most expensive U.S. Senate race ever. I can't win if Rubio's big-money Republican donors outspend me, and right now, Rubio's got a lot more cash in the bank than me – cash that can make all the difference in a race that could be decided by as little as 0.12 percentage points. That's why I must keep hitting goals. But with time running out, I'm still $12,000 short on my current goal push. I know I've asked a lot lately – it's not my favorite, but it's necessary to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority. And I need you to donate right now because I'm falling short of my goal, Derek. Thank you, Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via .
