name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Yuge Announcement: Join the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Big announcement! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9bf37549c9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
**My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative in Arizona, former policeman, firefighter, and paramedic, and proud leader of the Arizona Business community.**

_I am a pro-Trump, America-first Patriot, and most importantly I’m the first guy who took a stand and said NO; I listened to you when many others could not be bothered. I led a team of courageous legislators who joined me in the very first hearing that launched a nationwide phenomenon._

**America’s Audit is revolutionary. It is bold. It is groundbreaking. And it is working.**

_And now it’s time to take it to the next level! Can you help me in my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona?_
*Join the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project*
**I have been writing you for a while that America’s Audit in Maricopa County is just the start. **

>From this audit, there are really two difficult, but necessary prongs of our strategy: The first is to spread America’s Audit all around the country...

---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4040016bab&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And the second is to systematically protect the ballot box through meaningful legislation that will prevent voter fraud.

**Accusation without action is meaningless. And I believe strong and immediate action is required. ****That's why** [I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d089b92aa8&e=44b8c466b0)!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7c57f7e836&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **I have pushed for significant and unprecedented measures to protect our elections.**
_The Epoch Times_ reports:

_Finchem said there is no ballot integrity initiative anywhere else in the country at the moment, but in his travels, he’s encountered a high level of bipartisan interest._

_“Ballot integrity, a critical part of the election process, relies on fraud countermeasures to keep the fakes out of the system,” Finchem said in a 3-minute video announcing the project._

_“Election integrity—more broadly—relies on full-spectrum transparency. We can have full-spectrum transparency by making every ballot image a public record, available to everyone, all the time. Putting sunshine on something is a great disinfectant, and there is no reason not to do this.”_

_Finchem said the U.S. Treasury relies on currency-grade fraud countermeasures to prevent counterfeiting. He said Arizona’s election ballots should be no less secure and hard to fake or duplicate._

_The object is to create a “defined universe of ballots,” as opposed to “the wild west” of mail-in ballots during the 2020 presidential election, Finchem told The Epoch Times._

_While the concept of ballot countermeasures is Finchem’s idea, the execution will be done by Authentix authentication solutions, the Texas-based firm Finchem contacted to design and implement a secure ballot system for Arizona._

**Safeguards in place will include but not be limited to:**
* **Watermarks**
* **Ballot Identification Numbers**
* **QR Codes**
* **Embedded Holograms**

**We have to protect our elections like we protect our money.**

**_When you don’t protect the money, you get runaway inflation. When you don’t protect the ballot, you get election fraud._**

Folks, it’s that simple. And this is why I need your help to win my campaign for Secretary of State of Arizona.

**The Secretary of State is responsible for overseeing Arizona’s elections. And if I do not win this election, there is no guarantee that anyone will be able to actually protect these ballots.**

_As a State Representative, I stood up to the Left, I held the initial Election Integrity hearings, I spearheaded America’s Audit, and I have spoken around the country spreading the movement._

**_Imagine what I could do as Secretary of State of Arizona!_**

[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us secure Arizona’s ballots and spread them nationwide!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7245c97164&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=08dd541f93&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **My name is Mark Finchem. I am a true America First patriot, and I am THE guy you want in your corner defending our elections from the Radical Left.**

_We have seen what they have done, but by no means have we seen the extent of what they are capable of._

**They are just getting started. And so are we. We have to send a HUGE message, and the message has to be this year, before the election in 2022.**

[Can you help me send that message?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1f19d69aa1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _[Donate TODAY to join our movement and send a message to the Radical Left that you can’t mess with Arizona Elections!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a4ef269ea6&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0103b6b78b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6c456d005a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bca1fc3c3a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=bca1fc3c3a).
---

name: Marco Rubio
subject: This is not the email I hoped to send.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Peter, I really did not want to write this email to you.
|
---
| | | Peter, I really did not want to write this email to you.

We came so, so close to reaching our goal, but ultimately came up $2,483 short. **After mulling it over this morning, I 've decided to do something we haven't done in a while: Extend our deadline AND unlock 3X Matching for just ONE HOUR to close the gap.**

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58073875:6btDrFlNc:m:1:3253819041:6AD13CC5C23648C5C5B9CF4934949778:r "Timer")
---
| | [MAKE A 3X-MATCHED DONATION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58073875:6btDrFlNc:m:1:3253819041:6AD13CC5C23648C5C5B9CF4934949778:r "MAKE A
3X-MATCHED DONATION >>")
---

If you make a donation in the next hour, your impact will go three times as far in the fight to keep up with my Trump Impeachment Manager opponent's fundraising numbers. I know I've said it before, but her fundraising numbers last quarter were nothing short of alarming: **$4.6 MILLION.**

After being outraised last quarter, I simply cannot afford to be outraised this first month of the new quarter, which is exactly why I knew I had to reach out to you with this opportunity, Peter. _**Your name was on my list as one of the supporters who did not step up and donate to this July End of the Month Deadline.**_ I understand you get a lot of these, which is why I hoped that **unlocking 3X-Matching** for you would show you just how important this is.
**_My team set up this secure link for you to use, so that I can go back and see that you stepped up:_ ** _**[https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/eom-july-3x-21-extended-deadline/?3X-Matching-for-Peter](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58073875:6btDrFlNc:m:1:3253819041:6AD13CC5C23648C5C5B9CF4934949778:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/eom-july-3x-21-extended-deadline/?3X-Matching-for-Peter")**_
We can only afford to 3X Match donations for 1 HOUR, so I hope you'll act quickly. Fox News said this was going to be the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history, and CNN moved me up on their rankings of most vulnerable seats to flip -- it's only a matter of time before both the media AND the Democrats move me to #1 on their lists. Luckily, there's still time to stop that from happening.

I hope I'll see that you stepped up, Peter.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

---
|
---

---

Miami, FL 33266

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fauci promises nothing but more pain and suffering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D_qBI_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7aAZscCpyUyYcxZVDX4mQ9JmuobZmDFUMRfSFTBZnQljgZpdVjXurjH6MF7fIUwTr2OiyUlRRjZp1ECEPr8gTdYzhFM-2BiM5fNAgzkG0NQ65q5fOIS553T6-2FuQUV7aPyqcwADBIRl87V31pO-2BER6fg3pCAOW-2FkFu3vwgk-2F1-2BRtngHETesnXA1cwhgBSkN-2BnFtXI6mCJSCPdv5PUxnn-2FRxW0BRlDcYBmtZ9Ut6C9UH8FQXfMBKHxMBnngBbuj0JC8o4GQIXoJGowMbgYutF-2BqAeARKO0WG6kxpadX-2FTL3frO2OgiKgtm41DFLcprEkdbAnyemzH1qcTxXePNiE8lC5P6w-3D-3D)
---
| Dear Patriot, _“Things are going to get worse."_ Anthony Fauci has inflicted an enormous amount of pain and suffering on the American people already. And when he promises even more, you know he really means it. You see, King Fauci knows that his power depends on keeping the public afraid. That's why he's now going around whipping up fear and vowing to bring about more suffering and restrictions. In an interview on ABC, King Fauci said that even if someone is vaccinated, "you want them to wear a mask." That's insane. It makes no logical sense. It's dangerous pseudoscience. America has been damaged enough by lies from the ruling class and power-hungry bureaucrats like Fauci. It's time for the American public to send a message to Fauci – we're done listening to you! I've been the leader in the fight against the Lockdown Mafia and their boss, King Fauci. I've taken him on time and time again, and each time I've been proven right and he's been proven wrong. I've exposed Fauci and his lies to the entire world. I've revealed him as the fraud that he really is. [But I can't defeat Fauci if I don't have the resources. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3Dko9u_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7aAZscCpyUyYcxZVDX4mQ9JmuobZmDFUMRfSFTBZnQljgZpdVjXurjH6MF7fIUwTr2OiyUlRRjZp1ECEPr8gTdYzhFM-2BiM5fNAgzkG0NQ65q5fOIS553T6-2FuQUV7aPyqcwADBIRl87V31pO-2BER6fg3iGi1KBKUBMMgies6bAUxnB2ZL4C71KPTT7k40x4xsSvqxGPq-2FXypOdKZ2s4dNiKSEXMLqYYYK6YxNXD0GgZUHewREw83UZs1uJYdDh7E2Y7rAmaILx7nvkUyF8lukY8eG2RDIRVd1WI5Z-2FxgxH3-2FIuwJDaMaVYxpbP4uZsLnL-2BbTrQCy6KMYY-2BZWO8zhU15WQ-3D-3D) I'm working to build a nationwide movement against King Fauci and the Lockdown Mafia. Americans are a free people, and we should never sacrifice that freedom because of a government that is spreading irrational fear. But building that movement will not be easy or cheap. And the other side has tremendous resources of their own. In fact, we are going up against the full power of the federal government, and their allies in the liberal media. Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=cabc25e75b6c4996b4481e991ab19920&_e=U1N0ydQnRnzaXWIJ7ir1zG7QXRnfHytXGDsiqDUq7keL7w1S2XfwtODY7YJp1KQ_R0jrWOU1ar3BIV4BZX2fR-icLfHuHe_9G8UsBt-s84AuNkJZ6vbvIwrctQiKqv81pExpLatJj9k9fFPhd9cJnRUbgAOVUyS61Wvv2l9604h1gbj1AobZ7PTf2BrC-w7hY7rL2PpsvxOqAVvG0UyfMDP9qg13sE0lvvOpxKXP4HJGkgcWcRo92mlGWpb3aGANKeLmKVs2g8lQ4HHLGa3oEbf0hoDCfHCt3VOHrdXU1aEGrmyfgZUE-fkdQHpqKtnDRDOQmy-lCQJ7Jwoi4kkjMKu1UXhFn0QY-vOtqiM8H0rSVZLKO2TgSqlQDa_7LEdUB8eUhO0TLXJpZwmT9WqaDwWVL5ZQ-9_KudL7cHPDeqMZGkCfDusJ-TCMg35ha_UeZxQTt_3NjOwx205Cc9KIsRkWjwr_xsatqEEPGH4mo2GZ-Q5COoTgnoh8NMRjA3oyBf6F4eqZlK-AFzJt1NaMYA%3D%3D)**.

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can’t block Democrats’ pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=cabc25e75b6c4996b4481e991ab19920&_e=U1N0ydQnRnzaXWIJ7ir1zG7QXRnfHytXGDsiqDUq7keL7w1S2XfwtODY7YJp1KQ_R0jrWOU1ar3BIV4BZX2fR-icLfHuHe_9G8UsBt-s84AuNkJZ6vbvIwrctQiKqv81pExpLatJj9k9fFPhd9cJnRUbgAOVUyS61Wvv2l9604h1gbj1AobZ7PTf2BrC-w7hY7rL2PpsvxOqAVvG0UyfMDP9qg13sE0lvvOpxKXP4HJGkgcWcRo92mlGWpb3aGANKeLmKVs2g8lQ4HHLGa3oEbf0hoDCfHCt3VOHrdXU1aEGrmyfgZUE-fkdQHpqKtnD94yA5uhMRJ39b_rGtdDlDpLWF0LN12yQ0rC4gBYC_ioLmhfhbbeXmfVFdI4EvHUXXmSCu9L0AVnVu_x_4ceFmX-Cf8-6zMF5OVEnz2MBhv2xrMHNb9cspbN4ORP4TA2H3t2UtgHp09jo6jI4YNzAxaME_IDdBAsPEMVRHESxSUtL50zp1mP3RSllzP7sUbb15t1js5919WxUdMcRl_oLng%3D%3D)**.

| | Dear ,
I am writing you today with an urgent request. I need you to help me fight the DOJ.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America First Candidate who President Trump calls “a real leader in Arizona” running for Secretary of State in Arizona.**

_I am the first guy to take a stand and say NO. I listened to you when no one else could be bothered. I have led a team of proud America-First Patriots who are standing up valiantly to election fraud in Arizona._

**And the DOJ is threatening us in no uncertain terms, and I need your help TODAY.**

[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us stand up to the Department of Justice who is threatening America’s audit!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ae19a70deb&e=44b8c466b0)

| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fc356bcac3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***Fight the DOJ***
**I need your help because the Audit is under attack and the only way to ensure that the Democrats CANT steal our elections is for me to make a strong statement in my campaign for Secretary of State!**

The Washington Post is propagandizing on behalf of the Department of Justice:

_“There have been reports, with respect to some of the post-2020 ballot examinations, of proposals to contact individuals face to face to see whether the individuals were qualified voters who had actually voted,” the department stated, referencing Cyber Ninjas, the outfit that has proposed canvassing Arizona voters in search of voter fraud. “This sort of activity raises concerns regarding potential intimidation of voters. . . . Jurisdictions that authorize or conduct audits must ensure that the way those reviews are conducted has neither the purpose nor the effect of dissuading qualified citizens from participating in the electoral process. If they do not, the Department will act to ensure that all eligible citizens feel safe in exercising their right to register and cast a ballot in future elections.”_

_The directive is not a lawsuit, but it provides a clear predicate should Arizona or other jurisdictions flout voting laws. Given the uphill climb for new voting-rights legislation, aggressive enforcement of existing laws is critical. Attorney General Merrick Garland seems willing to combat fake audits, something not covered by legislation under consideration in Congress._

_When coupled with other developments at the Justice Department regarding matters related to Jan. 6, it seems Garland is attempting to dispel the impression that he intends to be a passive observer of an assault on voting rights. He does not have a lot of arrows in his quiver thanks to the filibuster and the Supreme Court’s cramped view of voting rights, but he sounds ready to make the most of what he has. That’s a development all Americans should cheer._

**“That’s a development all Americans should cheer.”**

This is what we are up against. Attorney General Merrick Garland is doing everything in his power to stop me in my quest to prove the fraud in the 2020 election.

_And we are already making great strides with the Arizona Audit._

**When we have found more than enough problematic votes to potentially overturn the Arizona election results, and Joe Biden’s lapdog starts barking, think we’re going to back down?**

**_Heck no._**

In fact, I’ve been going on the offensive.
---

---
| **I went on Steve Bannon’s show to issue a clear warning to the DOJ.**

_If you are going to interfere with a Constitutional Audit and are going to interfere with our ability to protect our own elections, I have one message for the DOJ._

**__Tread Lightly.__**
[_Donate GENEROUSLY today to help us fight back against Biden's weaponized DOJ!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3474012d13&e=44b8c466b0)
---

---
| **And then I appeared on OAN to discuss a crucial point with Natalie Harp.**

_If I don’t win the race for Secretary of State of Arizona, there is no guarantee there will be free or fair elections in the state of Arizona ever again!_

[_Donate TODAY to ensure free and fair elections in the state of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ac6e563b1&e=44b8c466b0)

Let me recap this for you.

**After we have found mountains of evidence substantiating our claims of fraud in the 2020 election, the Biden administration is scared.**

_The DOJ is sending Merrick Garland to fight us and take me down._

**But I am on the offensive. I will not let the cause of liberty down.**

**_And once again, to any Radical Leftist trying to interfere with the due process of America’s Audit:_**

**__Tread Lightly.__**

[Can you help me send that message?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=28042dccc3&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,

name: Team Malcolm
subject: Should the USPS Board fire Trump's Postmaster General?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Working people depend on the Post Office for so much
#

We all know that a functional postal system is critical to a thriving working class.
Working people depend on the Post Office for so much, from mail-in voting to prescription delivery and more, especially as COVID-19 continues to ravage communities.
But our Post Offices have been under attack with Trump's Postmaster General at the head. His flagrant attacks on a service we all depend on for our day-to-day lives are unacceptable.
In his effort to sabotage the 2020 election by slowing down delivery times, he delayed the delivery of medication, hurt small businesses, and made the lives of working people harder.
**So we must fight back. The USPS Board of Governors is having a public meeting this Friday, and it's our best chance to convince them to fire Trump's Postmaster General Louis DeJoy.**
[If you believe the Postmaster General should serve the people, not partisan politics, will you add your name now and demand the USPS Board of Governors FIRE Louis DeJoy? We need 100 people from Pennsylvania to sign our petition today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33522924/299146317/-363617049?refcode2=a63091a3-5ff5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210804-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjMwOTFhMy01ZmY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UcjoWVsCngnCgDVIMXgoAQ0xlPFj2p-IBYH-4mY_OKw=&emci=a13091a3-5ff5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a63091a3-5ff5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18034979)

If we don't stop Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, he could get away with his plan to saddle working families with higher postal costs and carry out the most significant rollback in the USPS' consumer services in decades.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Friend, will you personally endorse Mark Kelly?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Last month, another Republican entered the race to run against Mark in 2022, this one backed by a California billionaire — that brings us to FOUR opponents total now. Then on top of that, CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
If you thought all of that was bad, two weeks ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
It's clear Trump and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat. And one of the ways we planned to counter this wave of outside influence was by raising 40,000 small-dollar donations online last month to give us the resources to fight back.
Another way we plan on staying in the fight is by having people like you personally endorse our campaign. So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to add another 5,000 to that number today.
It’s a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: _keep Mark in the Senate where he can use science, data, and facts to improve people’s lives._
**So that’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen yet on our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement.**
[**Will you add your name to say you personally endorse our campaign for Senate? It’s important for Mark and our team to know that we can count on you to fight by our side and hold this seat.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210804-1-15&t=1&akid=1100%2E6688874%2EeLEFia)
[](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210804-1-15&t=2&akid=1100%2E6688874%2EeLEFia)
Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Mark can make a big difference in this race.
Because when you and thousands of others all speak out and say you’re with Mark, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives — and that’s something worth fighting for.
Thank you in advance for adding your name,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-july?source=em210804-1-15&t=3&akid=1100%2E6688874%2EeLEFia)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

clean_body: Friends — Last month, another Republican entered the race to run against Mark in 2022, this one backed by a California billionaire — that brings us to FOUR opponents total now. Then on top of that, CNN named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022. If you thought all of that was bad, two weeks ago, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.” It's clear Trump and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat. And one of the ways we planned to counter this wave of outside influence was by raising 40,000 small-dollar donations online last month to give us the resources to fight back. Another way we plan on staying in the fight is by having people like you personally endorse our campaign. So far, thousands of people have signed on to say they have Mark’s back, and we’re hoping to add another 5,000 to that number today. It’s a simple and small action, but it speaks volumes to what we are trying to do here: keep Mark in the Senate where he can use science, data, and facts to improve people’s lives. So that’s why we’re reaching out to those of you we haven’t seen yet on our list of folks who have signed on to make their personal endorsement. Something as simple as adding your name to say you support Mark can make a big difference in this race. Because when you and thousands of others all speak out and say you’re with Mark, you become part of a campaign that is focused on improving people’s lives — and that’s something worth fighting for. Thank you in advance for adding your name, Team Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

One of the biggest stories in the Lamestream Media yesterday was the very important Congressional race in Ohio and whether or not Trump-backed candidate, Mike Carey, would lose against a large and outstanding field of other candidates. The mainstream was chomping at the bit to report a loss for a Trump endorsed candidate--they couldn't wait. In fact the _Washington Post_ still hasn't corrected their very old story. But lo and behold, instead of a loss, there was a landslide victory for Mike--a win far larger than even the most optimistic of polls. It was a great day for Ohio, but the story of this victory has been barely reported by the Fake News. If my endorsed candidate would have lost, it would have been nothing but front page. Such a double standard, but congratulations to Mike, he will never let Ohio down.

[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Peter,
This is Texas Republican Congressman John Carter. As you likely know, **radical D.C. progressives are trying to silence conservative voices** in Texas and across the nation, **threatening to spread a blue wave throughout Texas and America**.
**Nancy Pelosi and the woke mob have now set their sights set on my friend, colleague, and fellow Texan, Congressman Pat Fallon (TX-04).**
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Why is Nancy going after Pat Fallon? Well, it’s simple. [Pat Fallon is a principled conservative Texan who supports putting America First, securing our borders, defending our military, standing tough against China, and preserving our American values and history. >>> Stand with Pat Fallon!](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
**Pat Fallon is the real deal.** He is a guy who literally rolled up his sleeves and went down to the border to see the horrible human trafficking and drug smuggling firsthand. **He cares deeply about Texas and loves our great country.**
**We must ensure that great conservatives like Pat have the resources necessary to stand strong against Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.** [This is a tough fight that we must win.](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
**They will stop at nothing to advance their agenda of __open borders, radical indoctrination in schools, oppressive taxes, and “woke” policies__. They want to flip Texas blue and destroy our country. We must stop them from taking over! That’s why I am asking you to support Pat Fallon today.**
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
[](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)
Together, with your help, Pat Fallon and I will continue standing up against the progressive “woke” agenda that threatens Texas and our nation. **We must hold his seat and take back our Republican majority in the House.** [I know I can count on you to join us in our mission to end Nancy Pelosi’s rule over the House once and for all!](http://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/Q_MhP9fNCr5imw0d6cp03A~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRi7UQcP0UgMzE5ODFkN2U5M2U2MjJjMmRkOGFlMzBkOWM0N2M3ZjhEN2h0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vam9obi1jYXJ0ZXIvY2FydGVyLWZhbGxvbi1tbmFXBXNwY2V1QgphCRy_CmFauCnpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAYFw~~)

Rep. John Carter (TX-31)

| | Derek, we’re in a crucial moment of our campaign.

Three consecutive polls show me neck and neck with my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin. _And_ he has been outspending us on TV for months.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: No more masks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Free State of Florida shows the way |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=11a2f1f8a0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Florida showed during the COVID era that you didn't need draconian shutdowns or mask mandates.

Some good old American common sense and freedom works just fine- now we need to bring it to the Federal level.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=13e0c8300e&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is carrying the water for Biden and his cronies.**

So, after finally admitting that vaccinated people could go without masks, the CDC- under political pressure from Biden- has reversed course and mandated masks yet again- even for the vaccinated!

Business Insider reports:

_The CDC recommended on Tuesday that fully vaccinated people wear masks in public indoor settings "in areas with substantial and high transmission." That includes a large swath of the US right now, including the vast majority of counties in the South._

_The CDC recommended that all teachers, staff, students, and visitors at K-12 schools mask up as well.

The goal of these new guidelines, CDC director Rochelle Walensky said, is to "help prevent the spread of the Delta variant and protect others."

The CDC said in May that vaccinated people don't need masks, a recommendation based partly on data indicating that vaccinated people were less likely to transmit the virus to others. _

So now the CDC is reversing course, just as Biden is hinting at another round of shutdowns.

Nancy Pelosi has even directed Capitol Police to arrest anyone not wearing masks on Capitol Grounds.

These measures didn't work before, and I am pretty sure they won't work again.

As usual, Florida Gov. DeSantis is showing us the way!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f2f941d111&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis is about to outlaw mask mandates for schools here in Florida!**

_Gov. Ron DeSantis on Thursday morning had separate phone calls with Senate President Wilton Simpson and House Speaker Chris Sprowls, fueling speculation that the Legislature may convene a special session to consider outlawing mask mandates in school districts.

The phone calls come as DeSantis increases talks about calling a special session on the issue if the federal government or Florida school districts move to implement mask mandates for students. Some districts, including Broward County Public Schools, voted this week to reinstate or keep mask mandates in schools as kids prepare to return to in-person learning in August._

**Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. Gov. DeSantis was right then in refusing mask mandates, and he's right now. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are abusing the COVID situation to centralize government power and remove our freedoms. I say we need to follow Florida's lead, not theirs!

The scare tactics must end! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a5f23460f1&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c7361f980d&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in, in 2020 as the GOP nominee. This time, in 2022, I'm back to win it!

Scare tactics are the enemy of freedom. We need to follow the lead of the Free State of Florida- and trust freedom first!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ab03cd7872&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=06ad795f33&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c25c50e3cf&e=afa21b7626)

clean_body: The Free State of Florida shows the way | | | | Hi Peter, Florida showed during the COVID era that you didn't need draconian shutdowns or mask mandates. Some good old American common sense and freedom works just fine- now we need to bring it to the Federal level. My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet , Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is carrying the water for Biden and his cronies. So, after finally admitting that vaccinated people could go without masks, the CDC- under political pressure from Biden- has reversed course and mandated masks yet again- even for the vaccinated! Business Insider reports: The CDC recommended on Tuesday that fully vaccinated people wear masks in public indoor settings "in areas with substantial and high transmission." That includes a large swath of the US right now, including the vast majority of counties in the South. The CDC recommended that all teachers, staff, students, and visitors at K-12 schools mask up as well. The goal of these new guidelines, CDC director Rochelle Walensky said, is to "help prevent the spread of the Delta variant and protect others." The CDC said in May that vaccinated people don't need masks, a recommendation based partly on data indicating that vaccinated people were less likely to transmit the virus to others. So now the CDC is reversing course, just as Biden is hinting at another round of shutdowns. Nancy Pelosi has even directed Capitol Police to arrest anyone not wearing masks on Capitol Grounds. These measures didn't work before, and I am pretty sure they won't work again. As usual, Florida Gov. DeSantis is showing us the way! | | Gov. DeSantis is about to outlaw mask mandates for schools here in Florida! Gov. Ron DeSantis on Thursday morning had separate phone calls with Senate President Wilton Simpson and House Speaker Chris Sprowls, fueling speculation that the Legislature may convene a special session to consider outlawing mask mandates in school districts. The phone calls come as DeSantis increases talks about calling a special session on the issue if the federal government or Florida school districts move to implement mask mandates for students. Some districts, including Broward County Public Schools, voted this week to reinstate or keep mask mandates in schools as kids prepare to return to in-person learning in August. Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. Gov. DeSantis was right then in refusing mask mandates, and he's right now. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden are abusing the COVID situation to centralize government power and remove our freedoms. I say we need to follow Florida's lead, not theirs! The scare tactics must end! ? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in, in 2020 as the GOP nominee. This time, in 2022, I'm back to win it! Scare tactics are the enemy of freedom. We need to follow the lead of the Free State of Florida- and trust freedom first! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - ! Friends -
Cubans deserve the right not only to survive but **_thrive_** , whether they're on the island or here in the United States.
The Cuban people have fought against dictatorships and oppression for over 60 years. They are justly demanding freedom from an authoritarian regime.
That's why the international community, including the United States, must step up and work with the Cuban people to produce solutions. We are proud of the Biden Administration's [decision to act](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33524979/299153727/997928158?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlMTk2OWY0LTY2ZjUtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NgeZzMC8Gg9KTOGNcM4cBnD1FVH4WyrUIJvdFb6DaG8=&emci=7135c6b4-38f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=3e1969f4-66f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7684583) and face this issue head on.
This Administration has targeted sanctions against the individuals directly responsible for the problems the island is currently facing. They are also working to secure internet access and remittances for the Cuban people.

name: Gavin Newsom

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
|

| |

Peter

I’m sure you know by now that California Republicans are trying to lead an effort to remove me from the Governor’s Office.

**_They will do whatever it takes to remove me and other Democrats from power_ — and with ballots arriving and voting beginning in just two weeks, we need to make sure we have the resources in place to fight this recall attempt and keep making progress for Californians.**

That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. Rep. Mike Thompson and I agree that we must defeat this recall attempt and stay focused on working for the people of California, and that starts with asking you to contribute to our campaigns to fight this effort.

[**_We need all hands on deck to win this fight. This is a critical race for Democrats to win if there’s any hope of expanding our Senate majority.
#

The race for North Carolina’s open Senate seat is one of the most competitive races for 2022.
That’s no exaggeration. The Cook Political Report, a top nonpartisan elections forecaster, ranked North Carolina as one of only three toss up races in the entire country.
That means this is a critical race in Democrats’ fight to hold the Senate majority. To pull it off, we’re counting on lots of grassroots support.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign to elect Cheri Beasley and flip North Carolina? Cheri can deliver real change for working people and winning this race could decide the Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33525748/299155910/-928165870?refcode2=9b2fdb3d-69f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210804-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJmZGIzZC02OWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WAZKr5Os4t0wdXDT8kViq6Jvh41yeGZUTQLTplDtR5w=)**

body:

# [HAPPY 60th BIRTHDAY, PRESIDENT OBAMA!!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T51af06d0-583c-490f-90df-e46b44bbf06d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Look, we’re so thankful for President Obama. He always did the right thing and treated the office of the President with respect and dignity -- a HUGE difference from the orange cheeto fascist who followed him. So we want this beloved former President to have the best birthday EVER! And that starts with sending him a massive birthday card. name: Team Walker
subject: Mark has some incredible endorsements!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
Will you join Mark’s growing list of conservative supporters like Tim Scott and Madison Cawthorn? Read more >>
Peter, When Mark Walker ran for Congress, he was a total outsider. But he knew that change was needed in Washington, so he began a grassroots campaign that focused on PEOPLE OVER POLITICS. He may have started with zero political capital, but thanks to his heart for bridgebuilding and his dedication to make a real difference, he quickly became an acclaimed leader on Capitol Hill. Through his hard work and sticking to his convictions, Mark has been able to build a broad coalition of conservative rockstars in North Carolina and across America who have offered their endorsements to his Senate campaign. **People like Madison Cawthorn, Tim Scott, Hike Huckabee, and every sheriff that Mark represented in Congress have given their support and full endorsement**. They and countless others know that Mark is the person we need for this job, to take back the Senate and defend our American values. **[For a full highlight of official endorsements, please CLICK HERE.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/643d7b59e1890249/95830460dd6ed2acc3d6b838967d376c/35903)** And if you’d like to join our growing grassroots team of supporters, please chip in with a donation today. Our campaign is funded almost solely by small-dollar donors — activists and concerned citizens who just want to live freely in America. **Can you chip in today to help us spread Mark’s message of commonsense conservatism?** [**CHIP IN $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/643d7b59e1890249/656e55ae6fd8b2eac3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/643d7b59e1890249/b90ef5a1cad4f0cdc3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/643d7b59e1890249/9a81680b2b1c2982c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**CHIP IN $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/643d7b59e1890249/1b9ced3fd0935075c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Every single donation helps us spread the word that Mark is the candidate who will go to bat for the Tar Heel State, and do right by every American fighting for individual freedom and liberty. Thanks for your support,

clean_body: Rachel Maddow’s blog just made a startling observation. | | | = | | Derek, Rachel Maddow’s blog just made a startling observation. When Glenn Youngkin seemed to agree that the courts could still remove Joe Biden and reinstate Donald Trump as president, he crossed a line that even extreme Republican Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t cross anymore. It’s the latest troubling sign that Glenn Youngkin just won't quit doubling down on Donald Trump’s lies about the 2020 election. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Glenn Youngkin has shown us that he’s willing to do whatever it takes to appease Donald Trump — even if that means undermining our democracy. Derek, these kinds of crazy conspiracies have no place in our politics. When he was in Virginia, President Biden urged us to do everything we can to win in 2021. As President Biden said, by stopping Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin in Virginia, we stand up for democracy in America. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thanks for taking a stand, McAuliffe HQ = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Protect this national treasure (petition)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33527756/299162549/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210804_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjkxYi03MWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCYR0yuob5P_jeWOqeeXV2tRLhLcs6DaGJx2tR_GTTc=&emci=8016f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8216f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, Alaska’s Western Arctic is a national treasure. It’s not only a sight to behold. It’s also the home of iconic animals like polar bears, muskoxen, migratory birds, and caribou: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33527757/299162550/136841483?refcode=MTH_em_20210804_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjkxYi03MWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCYR0yuob5P_jeWOqeeXV2tRLhLcs6DaGJx2tR_GTTc=&emci=8016f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8216f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) _National Parks Service / Jason Gablaski_ And it’s in imminent danger. Alaska’s Western Arctic could face irreparable damage from the Willow Project, a massive oil development originally approved by the Trump administration with the potential to produce **260 million metric tons of carbon dioxide emissions.** That’s why it’s so concerning that the Department of Interior recently defended the Willow Project in court. This action doesn’t match up with our shared climate, environmental justice, and biodiversity goals. We must do all we can to protect our public lands and waters — not destroy them. [**So Representative Alan Lowenthal and I led our colleagues in demanding that the Interior rescind this decision. Will you add your name next to mine to call on the Department of Interior to reverse course and protect our environment?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33527758/299162551/136841483?refcode=MTH_em_20210804_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjkxYi03MWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCYR0yuob5P_jeWOqeeXV2tRLhLcs6DaGJx2tR_GTTc=&emci=8016f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8216f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33527759/299162554/136841483?refcode=MTH_em_20210804_X_PET_CA_X_ACT_US_all_all_CA_MTH_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjE2ZjkxYi03MWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCYR0yuob5P_jeWOqeeXV2tRLhLcs6DaGJx2tR_GTTc=&emci=8016f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=8216f91b-71f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=252045)
---
Thanks for speaking out. Our public lands and waters are ours. It’s up to us to protect them.
—Martin Heinrich
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

clean_body: Folks, Alaska’s Western Arctic is a national treasure. It’s not only a sight to behold. It’s also the home of iconic animals like polar bears, muskoxen, migratory birds, and caribou: National Parks Service / Jason Gablaski And it’s in imminent danger. Alaska’s Western Arctic could face irreparable damage from the Willow Project, a massive oil development originally approved by the Trump administration with the potential to produce 260 million metric tons of carbon dioxide emissions. That’s why it’s so concerning that the Department of Interior recently defended the Willow Project in court. This action doesn’t match up with our shared climate, environmental justice, and biodiversity goals. We must do all we can to protect our public lands and waters — not destroy them. | Thanks for speaking out. Our public lands and waters are ours. It’s up to us to protect them. —Martin Heinrich | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. Breaking news folks -- the Republican National Committee is targeting Virginia in a big way -- they’re sending in 100 organizers to try and make Virginia red again. This near-record investment is on top of the $75 million that Glenn Youngkin has already pledged to personally spend buying the governor’s mansion.

This has consequences outside of the governor’s race, however -- this is the greatest gift Republicans running to flip the House of Delegates could have asked for. See, for years Democrats have invested in grassroots field campaigns -- it’s what has helped us win statewide and flip seats in Congress and the General Assembly.

The Republicans are taking our most effective campaign tactic and are starting to use it against us.

We can still win against the money machines of the RNC and Glenn Youngkin -- we have amazing candidates across the Commonwealth and a strong track record to run on, but we have to match their efforts on the ground. **[Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us elect Democrats across Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33528021/299163342/-4004927?refcode=ris_20210804_e_f_us_na_na_politicond&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODBmMDliMy03MWY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TWO9Uu0hMeEvUx3qkLwu8QfKbgE-2YAWH2_cY-q6ySY=)**

We aren’t just fighting against Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, and the RNC. We’re fighting to protect the progress we’ve made over the last few years. I hope you’ll join us.

Andrew Whitley

clean_body: will you join me in this fight to protect our progress? | | | | = Breaking news folks -- the Republican National Committee is targeting Virginia in a big way -- they’re sending in 100 organizers to try and make Virginia red again. This near-record investment is on top of the $75 million that Glenn Youngkin has already pledged to personally spend buying the governor’s mansion. This has consequences outside of the governor’s race, however -- this is the greatest gift Republicans running to flip the House of Delegates could have asked for. See, for years Democrats have invested in grassroots field campaigns -- it’s what has helped us win statewide and flip seats in Congress and the General Assembly. The Republicans are taking our most effective campaign tactic and are starting to use it against us. We can still win against the money machines of the RNC and Glenn Youngkin -- we have amazing candidates across the Commonwealth and a strong track record to run on, but we have to match their efforts on the ground. = We aren’t just fighting against Glenn Youngkin, Donald Trump, and the RNC. We’re fighting to protect the progress we’ve made over the last few years. I hope you’ll join us. Andrew Whitley = =******** =******** =** | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

name: Laura Loomer
subject: What's your score?
body:
A year ago this month, I warned everyone about the Chinese-style Social Credit System that tech companies were gearing up for at the time.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ) A year ago this month, I warned everyone about the Chinese-style Social Credit System that tech companies were gearing up for at the time.

I was mocked and labeled a "conspiracy theorist" of course, but this week, the headline on _The Hill_ screamed, "Coming Soon: America's Own Social Credit System."

The article focused on PayPal's new partnership with the ultra-left-wing Southern Poverty Law Center to investigate "propagators of anti-government rhetoric." They're not just talking about targeting and isolating your crazy uncle.

They're targeting me.

**They 're targeting you.**

And just like China has done, it will impact every move we make in the real world. From using a debit card to buying a plane ticket.

[**Help me get to Congress to block Big Tech from controlling our lives in the real world.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)

You know I've been banned from just about every major platform out there because I speak the truth.

I'm the poster-child of Big Tech's Social Credit System in America. I can't even get an Uber and I'm even banned from ordering food on Uber Eats.

But as Public Enemy #1 in the eyes of Big Tech, I've had to stay ahead of them for years, which is why I can predict their next moves that will impact you and your family.

Using January 6th as their excuse, Facebook, PayPal, Google and Twitter have ramped up their coordination with the FBI, ATF and TSA regarding what they call "anti-government activity".

And now, we can expect a massive dragnet across multiple platforms to monitor every word we say on and offline - **all controlled and run by the Big Tech Tyrants**.

Congress MUST pass legislation that protects the privacy of Americans on Social Media. Just as the government's "unmasking" of data to identify an individual is only allowed with a court order, Big Tech should be prevented from identifying and scoring individuals based on their political views and speech - private or public.

[**Help me get to Congress to make that happen.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)

The Mid-Term elections will be here before you know it.

My primary is now just a year away and to win this year, it will be the biggest fight I've ever faced.

[**I need you on board now.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)

[**Make a donation for my run for Congress today and help me jumpstart my campaign and make it to Washington to fight for you.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. You've noticed that when you have a conversation about something over the dinner table and then start getting ads about that topic on your phone, haven't you? Well, very soon, if you have a discussion about politics and say something deemed "anti-government" you'll get an extra point deducted from your Social Credit Score . . . or a knock on your door. [**Help me stop this madness and support my run for Congress.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/QQE12TBfNfDwmoOKxYG5jQ/tKLSnEPdMtUmt1zax05clQ)

Photo credit: Matt A.J.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I'm Standing In Joe Biden's Way
body:
Joe Biden wants me to get out of the way because I refuse to yield power to the federal government and strip Floridians of their liberties.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qX9amEoa3tT1aD8ri14qnAmUaRvgI4XRRm4WTS_ZNKwzg9g1J2KBKIPc4EuCM8UEighzuimlIJi3ApNnI0jYGdsaZBl-afW2iygnfQk7DL2Cx-5h8yTXpDS9M5qh_g5mdEa-rZ2gruheioxdrJ3GeA==&c=qc7pMSXYC7HpeJgkVbHL1vVKbTagLWCu2Rur-80062ETPLxjW62bXw==&ch=nYCz5calixarL27jAqghHTF17aRAnbaS00DXPQD6Q_4aTN_WgSzLbA==)
---
| Peter,
Joe Biden wants me to get out of the way because I refuse to yield power to the federal government and strip Floridians of their liberties. Well, I've got news for Joe Biden: I'm standing in your way and I'm not going anywhere.
[CHIP IN NOW TO HELP ME CONTINUE MY FIGHT >>> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qX9amEoa3tT1aD8ri14qnAmUaRvgI4XRRm4WTS_ZNKwzg9g1J2KBKA4R2hCJmGqRaiLDKw5I2YsdcGQAG2im-04poiJti6_2RWcwZTGUev2FfVaMFjrSYgIPxXzZScdVeeSF_kba4MdGhPfH9GWSUAy0d7GJXjnuBtT1c_-yuRoe5vtcwMgER145B0Q_WfiCGEsYIB_jaCHe8IoUnAjQOw==&c=qc7pMSXYC7HpeJgkVbHL1vVKbTagLWCu2Rur-80062ETPLxjW62bXw==&ch=nYCz5calixarL27jAqghHTF17aRAnbaS00DXPQD6Q_4aTN_WgSzLbA==)
Joe Biden has the nerve to tell me to get out of the way on COVID while he lets COVID-infected migrants pour over our southern border by the hundreds of thousands. No elected official is doing more to enable the transmission of COVID in America than Joe Biden with his open borders policies.
And until Joe Biden gets the border secured and this crisis under control, I do not want to hear a blip about COVID from him or his administration.
In Florida, we will continue to lift people up, not lock people down. Florida is a free state, and we will empower our people. We will not allow Joe Biden and his bureaucratic flunkies to come in and commandeer the rights and freedoms of Floridians.
So, when Joe Biden tells me to get out the way, I've got news for him. I will ALWAYS stand between power-hungry tyrants and the people of Florida.
[Chip in $100, $50, or even $20 to stand with me and tell Joe Biden that when it comes to defending our rights, we aren't going ANYWHERE. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qX9amEoa3tT1aD8ri14qnAmUaRvgI4XRRm4WTS_ZNKwzg9g1J2KBKA4R2hCJmGqRaiLDKw5I2YsdcGQAG2im-04poiJti6_2RWcwZTGUev2FfVaMFjrSYgIPxXzZScdVeeSF_kba4MdGhPfH9GWSUAy0d7GJXjnuBtT1c_-yuRoe5vtcwMgER145B0Q_WfiCGEsYIB_jaCHe8IoUnAjQOw==&c=qc7pMSXYC7HpeJgkVbHL1vVKbTagLWCu2Rur-80062ETPLxjW62bXw==&ch=nYCz5calixarL27jAqghHTF17aRAnbaS00DXPQD6Q_4aTN_WgSzLbA==)
Sincerely,
---
|

| Ron DeSantis

name: MS GOP
subject: We must say no to CRT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party
body:
Critical Race Theory or CRT is a dangerous idea we must reject. | |
---
Fellow Republican,
Critical Race Theory or CRT is a dangerous idea we must reject. It teaches young students to dislike each other based on the color of their skin. MLK was right when he said, “I look to a day when people will not be judged by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character.”

_**Unfortunately, Liberals want to go back in history and judge students based off the color of their skin, promote hatred of races, and root identity in race rather than character.**_

Join us today and push back against liberals advocating for critical race theory!
[_**JOIN US**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=e544e774556d4f2f889d37b11d9c4bfb&_e=Ktw_45whtdSDzya1qbMAXCEtVrYv81rAOX3jwyt0SZtEekR3Bbn_ENI_t19_qbnPJUbGX0Lhe14JfnkAYqbmRB_eTjsWwt6-UYGM_v2xWTLsLhUklYJ8CXB8L0YoBRtCuh8fKS7ZJ_iQJRWdX7Q3HZIB9G6l4yGa4CHYkxnXOQ5md2IlEvz52m4w4FPadPKhFkNFfc0SgokBHq6W3aL2hCta5oVNAc5uSReey2cO2LDOUS0QqkphX_pR46fBgq6G0aAq-7Q4O4ZzirgULAybiYo5Ji66qwelZDXmbz3oHIJy-9KTM7_tmV5pPinaYRWpCHALfrmEQqUursSUDmHsBuAD6w2katKIEgFHSaWpLMLgve7SMneI52woNDHVnZi9tjCRZw6ocTzfIJkT6gK8uQ%3D%3D)
Pitting students against each other and telling some they are better because of their race is wrong and unacceptable. Please, join us in our movement to shut down CRT.
-MS GOP

clean_body: Critical Race Theory or CRT is a dangerous idea we must reject. | | Fellow Republican, Critical Race Theory or CRT is a dangerous idea we must reject. It teaches young students to dislike each other based on the color of their skin. MLK was right when he said, “I look to a day when people will not be judged by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character.” Unfortunately, Liberals want to go back in history and judge students based off the color of their skin, promote hatred of races, and root identity in race rather than character. Join us today and push back against liberals advocating for critical race theory! Pitting students against each other and telling some they are better because of their race is wrong and unacceptable. Please, join us in our movement to shut down CRT. -MS GOP | Visit for more information. | | ---|--- Paid for by Mississippi Republican Party P.O. This situation in New York is _**textbook Democrat corruption!**_ The facts are clear, and Andrew Cuomo needs to resign IMMEDIATELY _\-- and then be arrested._

subject: the facts about masks, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r) | |
---
Peter,

Big tech is saying they want to crack down on "misinformation," but they're doing EXACTLY the opposite.

That's why they're censoring my video discussing the actual facts about masks.

YouTube won't play it, but you can hear it right from me here:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
**_The willingness to block useful information like this from the American public is truly sick and it is dangerous._**

Americans should have the right to know all there is to know and make decisions for their own health.

But with tech giants teaming up with Fauci, we're not hearing the truth. We're hearing regurgitated soundbites from a self-interested bureaucrat.

**It's not medicine. It's not science. And it's NOT true.**

They can try to silence me but Peter, I'm not backing down from this fight. Please, stand with me today to share the facts that Fauci and his allies don't want you to hear.
[**STAND WITH RAND: $5**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58072257:JB4LbFlNt:m:1:3253819041:6BD69B6988EDBDFB6458833CD0667DC0:r)
We must put an end to these fake "fact-checks" and get back to real science.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Hi Derek,

Right now we’re facing an uphill battle this November. Every poll has shown the Virginia Governor’s race in a dead heat, and we’ve got to work as hard as we can to ensure that Virginia stays blue.

I’ve spent my time as Attorney General fighting for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians, and was proud to stand as a staunch ally in Terry McAuliffe’s fight to restore rights to 173,000 Virginia residents. **We’ve been able to achieve historic progress, but it’s all on the line right now!**

**[Derek -- will you split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good VA today? name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Stand up for America's political prisoners
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Watch my latest press conference. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/political-prisoners-2472810?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5423b999b1&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

This is an unpopular opinion among the elites in Washington...

...but the January 6 protestors are Americans, they have constitutional rights, and they deserve to be treated with equality under the law. The way the jail guards and staff treated and verbally threatened me, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Matt Gaetz and Louie Gohmert reinforced the claim of abuse asserted by attorney James McBride.

[Watch me speak out on their behalf](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5a6de0e5ed&e=645b3b1338):

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9a3a473d79&e=645b3b1338)

Many of these protestors -- and most who haven't even been charged with a violent crime -- are rotting in a D.C. jail without bail, awaiting trial.

They are in solitary confinement, abused by jail guards, not given access to lawyers, have been overcharged with bogus felonies, and have no trial dates in sight.

We went to visit them today -- a normal activity for members of Congress -- _and we were kicked out of the jail_.

It's long past time that our Justice Department answers this very serious question: why are mostly peaceful American protestors being treated worse than terrorists held at GITMO?

Many in the Republican establishment are afraid to speak out about this, and the Communist Democrats are happy they're being punished.

_But I refuse to abandon these Americans_.

[_**Show me you have my back -- and theirs -- by contributing to my election campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e9edcd9b8e&e=645b3b1338).

Defying the establishment like this, and standing up for these politically persecuted Trump supporters, comes at a cost.

I'm already one of the NUMBER ONE targets for the RINOs in Washington.

They've said explicitly that they want to find a primary opponent to try to take me out:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=44211791de&e=645b3b1338)

_But I won't stop_.

I will continue to seek justice for the Trump supporters rotting in the D.C. jail, and I will continue to put America First.

[**_You can help me by contributing to my reelection campaign right away, so I can fend off any primary challenger I might face from the D.C. Swamp_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c870cd0ca1&e=645b3b1338).

[_**I need your generous contributions today so I can continue to battle the RINOs and the Communist Democrats on behalf of the America First movement -- including fighting for the rights of the protestors being unjustly held in jail**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=1971d9bd4f&e=645b3b1338).

In America, you are never supposed to be punished before being convicted of a crime.

Our Fifth Amendment gives us the right to due process.

The mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are _clearly_ being punished right now -- and none of them have even gone to trial yet.

As I asked at my press conference: where is the ACLU? Where is Human Rights Watch? Where is Amnesty International?

Why aren't these groups standing up for the unjustly persecuted American patriots?

The answer is simple: because these "watchdogs" exist to do the bidding of the Communist Democrats, and globalist Special Interests.

They are partisans, not watchdogs.

_I won't back down until these wrongs are righted_.

[_**But I need your support now more than ever**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=10ee6340bd&e=645b3b1338).

[_**By contributing $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away, you're helping me stay in the fight, so I can keep battling to get to the bottom of the political persecution of these Trump-supporting protestors**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=cc2f595986&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you for your attention to this urgent matter, and for your generous support.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f7de5d1e57&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The mostly peaceful January 6 protestors are being held as political prisoners in Washington.

[_**Help me expose this injustice and keep fighting for their rights as Americans with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**_](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d01b852d19&e=645b3b1338).

name: Ready for Stacey
subject: Stacey Abrams to brave Texas Dems: “Keep on fighting”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Progressive champion Stacey Abrams has a message for the bold legislators fighting back against the GOP's unhinged assault on voting rights in Texas: **“I am proud of the Texas Democratic legislators who are fighting tooth and nail to protect democracy in Texas and across our country.” \-- Stacey Abrams** You remember, Peter, how 50 Democrats in the state legislature fled Texas to block the unhinged Republicans' authoritarian voter suppression bill. Believe it or not, those brave legislators haven't left Washington, D.C. since that day. They are strategizing with progressive leaders like Bill and Hillary Clinton and Stacey Abrams to mount a strong defense against this insidious GOP power-play. | **[STAND WITH STACEY: PROTECT THE VOTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33530370/299169630/103943381?refcode=OUT_20210804_GEN_FDR_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQwOTExN2U2LTdiZjUtZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NaU9e642vbHrJP0blXwdLTQ0z7hL0HgJkNBMoVurxcc=)**
---

The Republican electioneering machine has targeted Texas because the GOP is convinced that Democrats across the nation won't pay attention to what happens there. Well, they've got another thing coming, Peter.

Stacey's right when she tells the Texas Democrtic legislators that “what you're doing is bigger than just Texas.”

If you agree that the GOP is undermining American democracy by suppressing the vote in Texas, then Stacey Abrams needs your help Peter. When Democrats Turn Out is leading an aggressive nationwide digital and ground campaign to replace these cynical, self-serving Republicans with real progressives who will fight for our values in the House and Senate. Our movement needs to win strong support at all levels of government to give the Texas Democrats a fighting chance against the GOP. **Can we count on you to stand with Stacey Abrams and progressives across the nation in the fight to protect voting rights?**

**[This can't wait, Peter. Quick update, friend.

**Last night, the Biden administration announced they will extend the eviction moratorium in counties with substantial and high levels of community transmission.**

This is welcome news for many families behind on rent, and was the right thing to do, but our work is not finished! As it stands, billions in federal rental assistance is NOT getting into the hands of those who need it most.

As Covid-19 cases surge, it's critical that we address the core issues of homelessness and evictions: » Income instability
» Lack of high-wage jobs
» Healthcare debt
» Student loan debt
» Out of reach childcare **[Texans and people all across this country need a Congress that is focused on the financial prosperity of our families. It's my pledge to bring solutions to working families by lowering the cost of healthcare, education, and enacting debt relief. Chip in $3 to support our efforts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33530722/299170532/77586780?refcode=em-08042021-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzg4YjNmZi03ZGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ldXZmvujXzWEzHzo1uG1IcnqHuE4m2NDDQkX7GuwL8=)**

Thank you,

Donna

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Donna Imam**
Date: Tue, Aug 3, 2021 at 11:01 AM
Subject: Millions of families facing eviction.

Friend,

I've been so humbled by your support during our first full month on the campaign trail. Thanks to you -- and hundreds of grassroots supporters across the country -- we met the mark on our July end-of-month goal. _Thank you!_

It's tough to spend too much time celebrating this achievement as Sunday marked a somber day for millions of families across the country. The federal eviction moratorium officially ended, and authorities began eviction proceedings.

**According to the latest Census Bureau July survey, more than 7.4 million families are behind on rent and 3.6 million said they would have to leave their homes in the next two months due to eviction.** It's absolutely unacceptable that as the top 1% in this country added $8 trillion in wealth in the past year, anyone would face homelessness or eviction -- especially while the pandemic continues to devastate many families and livelihoods.

The American Rescue Plan and Consolidated Appropriations Act allocated $46 billion in emergency rental assistance to help families facing eviction. Not requiring that these funds be distributed timely to prevent evictions is unforgivable.

**This is not the time to leave working families behind.** I'm urging the Biden administration to extend the CDC eviction moratorium right away while states distribute rental assistance to families in need. Democrats need to step up for the millions of Americans now worried about being kicked out of their homes.

Thanks for standing with me,

Donna

Peter, in the last election, we won the House, the Senate, and the Presidency. So, voters and Democrats are right to ask this question: _"Why can’t we pass voting rights reform??"_ **It’s because the MAGA Republican minority in the Senate has weaponized the filibuster to block voting rights legislation like the For the People Act, and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.**

Progressives have the solution here, Peter: The only way to protect our elections and save our democracy is to end the filibuster.

[**Peter, will you join the growing national movement to end the filibuster by signing this brand new petition now? | | Friend,

August is National Water Quality Month, and with the Southwest and West confronting a severe water crisis, **it’s more critical than ever that we protect our nation’s greatest freshwater treasure — our Great Lakes.**

Millions of people rely on the water resources of the Great Lakes for drinking water, work, and leisure -- including our region’s local economy; the Great Lakes generate over $60 billion in wages every year.

**Ensuring that all Americans have access to clean drinking water is a top priority of mine. That’s why I’m working hard in Congress to ensure the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative (GLRI) is fully funded and meeting the enormous needs of our region.** President Trump wanted to eliminate this program. Working in a bipartisan manner, and with the help of supporters like you, we were able to save this essential program.

**[Friend, I will never stop fighting to protect the Great Lakes. Can you chip in $15 to help me keep this seat in Congress so we can continue our fight to protect the Great Lakes?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKkSubMmYhPlkyEMD_vQ5lx63eHoLYiJ9IhOLLvFvzZk2uyCJb5mrdV4JYEeZrvijXjLZnd8ZiBvJZKFWTMuMvkSsbjWIaVeH0M_CEvLNNGqODUWBfpISCpeXxVZGz7m33jUPBsToC-Avi2qFUaLBB2Yo1OIHUAJUxuV1FfGorhUbrZVLHYbz7cVqaSYU2f1jghnC5ZqdFNIbWgUKtityHqm-HOMWFHcE7na0rSiuvmpaApvUNb44pE5EgvqcZKbGK-Xnlz1eeLlAkM03dz86BTZINAYsmpEpT0OMiLjLju78C0h5c__apNL0_-NII7x_D8Yn46cGaagGk-G1DKtAkTR34VQRebLpnqC05KKrB359dNvnYeS2PtwafzoS_2GyMGEYaTtZJfl1COvJJ1uwyR82jCZeWluN0kKsDCcu14kA/3e6/pkPZcApRQMif390-J8vPgw/h1/EGE9NupYwvN0SshPyI3tu2erhFjZFVPkYBZ4H4S3s6s)**

The GLRI has already made extraordinary progress by removing contaminants from 17 sites and working to mitigate toxic effects at six areas of concern. **But as heat waves and droughts intensify -- and freshwater contamination grows rampant -- the Lakes continue to be at risk.**

**We need to do everything in our power to protect our freshwater, our ecosystem, and the people who depend on this vital resource.**

As a member of the Great Lakes Task Force, I am fighting to secure the robust federal investments needed to continue protecting our Great Lakes, and the drinking water for millions of Americans. **[Can you chip in $15 to help send me back to Congress so I can continue fighting for policies that ensure a sustainable future for the Great Lakes?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCEkdHNItV39y3s-lvKgkMA4wdHHN35CFRCbAMDF5yZdKkSubMmYhPlkyEMD_vQ5lx63eHoLYiJ9IhOLLvFvzZk2uyCJb5mrdV4JYEeZrvijXjLZnd8ZiBvJZKFWTMuMvka-SLjtt4aY_Zk2NlW2MPddQdpEw7GOWYIuZnMeACCz-pJdBC37mJi0b8Y8LcT_NgCCroV98Lh6Hkl7bgdVvPAP_iaNIFsCKcG_cIcqbUyZ2VlmVY2twPwozeXwIaJ0dEza-lmJv_BPaXFbiJrmr_sWu6twqPhRzqjSgYxCli1Cn_8AlFF0d3_J5tn17_zThquZoSpqXIgbcS_gcjAUYe0cORe4Fb89zXXPrUg0jvP0qSaDU9laVTO_lV5LYX79Ij9eKeBTeeCpJ8EgGaxNart3Vr1kUYHVjUHcBOat8xvfWAE8ER3i0G4L2Y9vJCUV0qODTgA01qIGArF06Ji_GL2A/3e6/pkPZcApRQMif390-J8vPgw/h3/Jj2z0f6chUD-xA5W-iGeVFqQ3a8otGsP5LPCOhwWcYE)**
