clean_body: Protecting the source of drinking water for over 30 million Americans | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Friend, August is National Water Quality Month, and with the Southwest and West confronting a severe water crisis, it’s more critical than ever that we protect our nation’s greatest freshwater treasure — our Great Lakes. Millions of people rely on the water resources of the Great Lakes for drinking water, work, and leisure -- including our region’s local economy; the Great Lakes generate over $60 billion in wages every year. Ensuring that all Americans have access to clean drinking water is a top priority of mine. That’s why I’m working hard in Congress to ensure the Great Lakes Restoration Initiative (GLRI) is fully funded and meeting the enormous needs of our region. President Trump wanted to eliminate this program. Working in a bipartisan manner, and with the help of supporters like you, we were able to save this essential program. | The GLRI has already made extraordinary progress by removing contaminants from 17 sites and working to mitigate toxic effects at six areas of concern. But as heat waves and droughts intensify -- and freshwater contamination grows rampant -- the Lakes continue to be at risk. We need to do everything in our power to protect our freshwater, our ecosystem, and the people who depend on this vital resource. As a member of the Great Lakes Task Force, I am fighting to secure the robust federal investments needed to continue protecting our Great Lakes, and the drinking water for millions of Americans. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, \-- Marcy Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help us send Marcy Kaptur back to Congress? ****** | **** **** **** **** | | Paid for by Marcy Kaptur for Congress Checks may be mailed to: P.O. Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697, United States | | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Marcy Kaptur for Congress, please .

body:
Fellow Conservative, This entire past year, Democrats have been advocating to defund the police, **_even as the rate of violent crime in America’s major cities has been on a steady increase!_** To make matters **EVEN** worse, Democrats want to decriminalize hard drugs, even though there’s already been a **40%** increase in shootings and a **33%** increase in homicides over the last year. Is it any surprise that police resignations have shot up **45%** over the last year?

body:
They’re wasting Arizona taxpayers’ time and resources to keep their lie alive — and Paul Gosar is validating them.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33531197/299172926/-1417481727?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210804-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjIxMWY1ZS04MGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B8zNwIniXfE4nKQDy03b1xxPiGU9WmP2DisdNJeA7Aw=)
---
| We all saw what spreading Donald Trump’s Big Lie can lead to when a violent mob invaded our nation’s Capitol building on January 6. Now, Arizona is ground zero for the Big Lie and all of the dangerous, deranged conspiracy theories that come with it.

National Republicans are dumping millions into a fraudulent audit of the 2020 election results in our state because they can’t accept reality and admit Trump lost. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Protect Arizona families from eviction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
---
Friend,
I am immensely thankful to the Biden Administration for extending the eviction moratorium through October 3rd.
Arizona continues to battle the COVID-19 pandemic, but the number of eviction filings is steadily increasing. What's worse, the areas being hit hardest by COVID are also seeing the highest number of eviction filings.
**This extension is a godsend for so many families -- but there is still work to do. **
In June, the U.S. Supreme Court prevented President Joe Biden's administration from extending the original moratorium, which had been in effect since September.
**While this moratorium extension is absolutely the right thing to do to keep people in their homes and out of crowded settings, there is a chance it could end at any moment. **
I've spent my time in the State Legislature fighting for the communities who have been hit hardest by this pandemic, and I can assure you that as your next Congresswoman I will continue to fight just as hard on the House Floor.
[**Can I count on you to take action and join me in supporting the ****extended eviction moratorium?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33532155/299185200/1537529973?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzA2OWJmYS04NGY1LWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vckeIBYWjep_h2jJRGFkAwcGGixrGap9U4aHGmCiKaA=&emci=572b5184-6df5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=d3069bfa-84f5-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=12898431)

name: Team Erica Smith
subject: re: a huge campaign milestone 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We’re officially halfway through our statewide tour, and it’s your support that’s made it all possible.
#
Our campaign hit a huge milestone: **We visited the 50th county of our _100 Counties, 100 Days_ tour!** 🎉
We’re *officially* halfway through our statewide tour, and it’s your support that’s made it all possible. **[Will you make a donation of $3.29 — the average cost of a gallon of gas in North Carolina — or more to our 100 Counties Gas Fund to help Erica connect with voters in the next 50 counties?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8324?refcode=em20210804-314&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=314%2E3698%2EehK6xg)**
**[Contribute $3.29](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8338?refcode=em20210804-314&t=20&akid=314%2E3698%2EehK6xg)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8324?refcode=em20210804-314&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=314%2E3698%2EehK6xg)
At the heart of our _100 Counties, 100 Days_ tour is the belief that everyone is worthy of being seen, fought for, and represented.
That’s why from our mountains to our coastal communities, to our big cities and small rural towns, we are going everywhere, meeting voters where they are, and leaving no one behind — but Erica is counting on your support to help us do it.
Erica doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs, lobbyists, or fossil fuel companies — so when we say our campaign (and this tour) is funded by grassroots supporters like you, we mean it _literally_!
[**So if you’re able, will you chip in $3.29 or more to our 100 Counties Gas Fund to help us fill up the tank in our campaign van and connect with as many voters across North Carolina as possible?**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/8324?refcode=em20210804-314&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=314%2E3698%2EehK6xg)
Let’s do this!
Team Erica Smith

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210804-314-footer&t=23&refcode2=314_3698_ehK6xg&akid=314%2E3698%2EehK6xg)**

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45407925&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDkwMDI4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45407925&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MDkwMDI4NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

clean_body: | | | We need your immediate attention: After Republicans introduced more than 4OO voter suppression bills nationwide, two of our most beloved Democratic heroes have teamed up to defend our democracy and SAVE voting rights! FIRST: Stacey Abrams called on Americans everywhere to fight back against Republican-led attacks on voting rights: THEN: Hillary Clinton sprang into action and joined Stacey in the fight: NOW: | We can't afford to let Stacey and Hillary down. NOT when Republicans are still fighting to avenge Donald Trump by attacking our voting rights. AND NOT when anti-voting rights Republicans are shattering fundraising records to defeat our House Majority. So please, will you chip in $3 to protect our House Majority before it's too late? | If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | Thank you, DCCC Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

**We can no longer stand for their hypocrisy! The rules for thee and not for me, will no longer fly!**
Since they refuse to ACTUALLY follow the science, who knows what lockdowns they may force on us next.
That is why we need to take our stand now!

All across the country the Democrats are hosting and going to maskless events, all the while they are imposing strict lockdowns and new mandates on YOU! We can no longer stand for their hypocrisy! The rules for thee and not for me, will no longer fly! Since they refuse to ACTUALLY follow the science, who knows what lockdowns they may force on us next. That is why we need to take our stand now! Don’t take the bait and trust these hypocritical Democrats. Thanks, Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

Friend,

It is with great concern that we write this email. Concern for the future of this country, unborn children, and hard-working American tax dollars.

_**Yes – All of this is at stake if Democrats continue to push the repeal of the Hyde Amendment.**_

**Our hard-earned money should NOT go toward funding abortions.**

Washington Democrats have officially launched an all-out ASSAULT on our Right to Life -- and they want YOU to pay for it.

Democrats across the country are celebrating this repeal since for the first time in decades, the House Appropriations Committee has passed a budget without the Hyde Amendment.

This is nothing to celebrate.

**[This is just another reason why it is CRITICAL for Republicans to Take Back The Senate so this bill can be effectively squashed.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=1b9c1cdc43b844c7b50f62a2e5f9fcb2&_e=fwRbQSdzHUGiT81pdBt0OOw60qGvvequDuvFRLWBF9d02q2qLUf1hynoLqPKdy8-yqkQHJsMHcV-uMxDlIKMy5EOCET5N9E1jVOyLfhnNTifKgb8KJbjIxEdTTd-4qzsV3VhXaswjYlsKu-JiGjuD9QrRhngQSOSs-DB8gUuunvd08PZf6giNFc2i5UAcAJMbfE5Qr_9sgnrjJSjY42VQFXkCR34r5uKSmAxpRObFMf6RW7Z67cVHuG1Fh_k1HtV4hK21OHm2Gl-lB9RvICZn_5vi5_7hL6qpGbETz7aon6IhTVNzLBSCoGU9CARcAARaJXgy-RYUGkha3Vc81IIDmy7vyDQ7547priY8mIPitRpYGZtDCTOQK_-L4Ebwn1EUykS-K1RKSBzBxpoGcG5mH0n3TiwJwiuXM4o1g8WoyLQU6xUr-C1dkA_emdY2FvQhE2KwL5Fuu9KbtodVVhYXTXZVYJj4Lj8JmNvBN_c2iI%3D)** | | [**STEP UP**](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=1b9c1cdc43b844c7b50f62a2e5f9fcb2&_e=fwRbQSdzHUGiT81pdBt0OOw60qGvvequDuvFRLWBF9d02q2qLUf1hynoLqPKdy8-yqkQHJsMHcV-uMxDlIKMy5EOCET5N9E1jVOyLfhnNTifKgb8KJbjIxEdTTd-4qzsV3VhXaswjYlsKu-JiGjuD9QrRhngQSOSs-DB8gUuunvd08PZf6giNFc2i5UAcAJMbfE5Qr_9sgnrjJSjY42VQFXkCR34r5uKSmAxpRObFMf6RW7Z67cVHuG1Fh_k1HtVcNahhOzHIj56wrcHo0-ddnkvmDw0i6A66q9R72MFg8tXUVaT1J_zB8v8FN_IzDLrlyZ1hSrl5FuGcVUM5mfLqlkbjAAvS7ENvh3v8f0q_DGUiHJwgbm6tmf7kyAmvhCkJbuvhcFOQqO4jovD-C0c4VEyqZF0BnyD504c6W6YWsmfG3PhkR25EaivJ2b6UTY7r8dFoTJNQb2fuvWpf9whyXJHnDv8xIW9euQ4T9CEGs7pmxwrT7hbcBarT98aUVM0)

Fellow Conservative,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=11e320c45acc425b8be6b0cac366ca90&_e=KHLWvzO9C8zQpreXgI4Sk95MploeGHKEFnPXDVgYPcmCIbcWsRwGB98YsHh2SVTNxCVnZo1xjoXrkseJcG7SgDwbZrcJRAtLyegzx8FRy32hF_YiwqeJ3DrfWw8mhgePNOGvwnMuWshREQKNjgHgg3fKrv1n3tkMJPJBMksnWXjTGdRO2C0pqflCkXoq3x0s28dW1MnGl5SWzfXO_Jend_1UuOACUqhKCDbkHP1ZZVtSm6VrJcjppP8hI98PV63U3FHOQB5DWYBtFn9tRZVQ7joG6d8h1YWs4vMy48Gsps3Rko6TelZqDZyWpzOa17jSWQAcmdxAh3XYMxlFMucyGAvKDSCsq1gTWVrxWgIME8zDgyA0Glw4MCEOr-gAw0iW6c18ortPyOwIoykrUwYBTieF7YuQT7S44VFBodeFBCV1sk4t5b1eEqpiNKqJWfr0e0n03vv3kDdHHqz4p89DbIIZAfqSyuGXyc1Pm6sSiWiH70xPq-hGnfWcMETIr9ABssj5lv2xQ1V0HJjhmY1Z9Q%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year – **it’s imperative we’re able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

The American people made it clear in November’s election – they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=11e320c45acc425b8be6b0cac366ca90&_e=KHLWvzO9C8zQpreXgI4Sk95MploeGHKEFnPXDVgYPcmCIbcWsRwGB98YsHh2SVTNxCVnZo1xjoXrkseJcG7SgDwbZrcJRAtLyegzx8FRy32hF_YiwqeJ3DrfWw8mhgePNOGvwnMuWshREQKNjgHgg3fKrv1n3tkMJPJBMksnWXjTGdRO2C0pqflCkXoq3x0s28dW1MnGl5SWzfXO_Jend_1UuOACUqhKCDbkHP1ZZVtSm6VrJcjppP8hI98PV63U3FHOQB5DWYBtFn9tRZVQ7joG6d8h1YWs4vMy48Gsps3Rko6TelZqDZyWpzOa17jSiMJzBjQ1aNt5IVXpW2mlbzwlonzfqUU3TpVBerthCAmEq0Z-kbLZXvIKVYkJFY7ETSWzsKxCzNO5qIy4sWsE0_2EfuRbtNBE4tVzC7kN2U9F5tC4QK7PKJa0DmyjXDhgju-T8sIQ8LqY4v9oYifVcn7QotV30NxbzlNuX1H-8ynq0t-Eh8coYgABW6op9r2-SwKVpkckNDjzrK9ktp4duw%3D%3D)**.

name: Team AOC
subject: Cori got it done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210804-2323-header&t=1&akid=2323%2E2526796%2EP6LECc)
Last Friday night, Rep. Cori Bush brought a chair and sleeping bag to the U.S. Capitol. As soon as the House adjourned for vacation without passing an extension on the federal eviction moratorium, she decided to stay behind and fight for the 11 million people at risk of losing their homes.
Alexandria joined Cori at the steps of the Capitol for five days — along with hundreds of their colleagues, activists, and organizers — to keep up the pressure and demand that Congress and the Biden administration take action to extend the moratorium.
They were told that it wasn’t possible. But Cori's organizing worked. **Yesterday, the Biden administration announced an extension of the eviction moratorium covering 90% of the U.S. — the areas hardest hit by the pandemic.**
This would not have happened without the fearless moral leadership of Cori Bush, or without the dedicated members of our movement who joined Alexandria and Cori at the Capitol steps.
[Will you split a $6 contribution today to support our movement and ensure Cori and Alexandria continue fighting for working families in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-2323-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2323_2526796_P6LECc&akid=2323%2E2526796%2EP6LECc)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-2323-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2323_2526796_P6LECc&akid=2323%2E2526796%2EP6LECc)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-2323-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2323_2526796_P6LECc&akid=2323%2E2526796%2EP6LECc)
_Photo credit: Corey Torpie_
This rapid response organizing is only possible because of the funding provided by small-dollar donors like you. Thank you for being a part of this work.
Today we celebrate this win, and square our shoulders for the fights to come. Eviction is still a threat to millions more in our country — and we can’t stop until we can guarantee safe, affordable housing for all.
**A $6 contribution from you today will ensure that Cori and Alexandria can continue fighting for transformative policy change that protects working families.**[If you’re able, please split $6 or whatever you can between our campaigns now to power this important work. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210804?refcode=em20210804-2323-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2323_2526796_P6LECc&akid=2323%2E2526796%2EP6LECc)
Thank you for making this possible,
Team AOC

clean_body: Last Friday night, Rep. Cori Bush brought a chair and sleeping bag to the U.S. Capitol. As soon as the House adjourned for vacation without passing an extension on the federal eviction moratorium, she decided to stay behind and fight for the 11 million people at risk of losing their homes. Alexandria joined Cori at the steps of the Capitol for five days — along with hundreds of their colleagues, activists, and organizers — to keep up the pressure and demand that Congress and the Biden administration take action to extend the moratorium. They were told that it wasn’t possible. But Cori's organizing worked. Yesterday, the Biden administration announced an extension of the eviction moratorium covering 90% of the U.S. — the areas hardest hit by the pandemic. This would not have happened without the fearless moral leadership of Cori Bush, or without the dedicated members of our movement who joined Alexandria and Cori at the Capitol steps. Photo credit: Corey Torpie This rapid response organizing is only possible because of the funding provided by small-dollar donors like you. Thank you for being a part of this work. Today we celebrate this win, and square our shoulders for the fights to come. Eviction is still a threat to millions more in our country — and we can’t stop until we can guarantee safe, affordable housing for all. A $6 contribution from you today will ensure that Cori and Alexandria can continue fighting for transformative policy change that protects working families. Thank you for making this possible, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Congresswoman Miller-Meeks
subject: Take them back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress

The amount of control that the Biden Administration and Nancy Pelosi want over your family is terrifying. What's even scarier is how much power they’ve gotten away with taking from the American people.

**_It’s time for us to stand up to Biden and Pelosi and take our power back!_**

They tried to steal my election and they will try it again. Nancy Pelosi will do ANYTHING she needs to if it means more power for her and her cronies.

I’m running for re-election because I want to stand up for the American People, and accomplish all of the work that we have left to do. It is time that we all start to demand accountability from the government, firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House is the first step.

We have to amp up our efforts at Taking Back the House, and we have to do it now!

body:

|
---
### Watch John Cox at Gubernatorial Debate Tonight at 6pm
FOX 11 will host tonight’s gubernatorial debate, starting at 6pm PT. John will join Kevin L. Faulconer, Kevin Kiley, and Doug Ose to discuss the issues facing Californians and why Gavin Newsom should be recalled. You can stream the debate LIVE [here](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=21962d696a&e=b8a6795190).The debate will be moderated by Hugh Hewitt, president of the Richard Nixon Foundation, Robert C. O’Brien, former U.S. National Security Adviser Ambassador, and Christine Devine and Elex Michaelson of FOX 11.
John will share his vision for California’s future and why he is the best choice to lead this state. Californians have had enough of Gavin Newsom’s failures and deserve better.
**Debate Details:** Date: Wednesday, August 4Time: 6 p.m. to 7:30 p.m PT
| [WATCH THE DEBATE](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=4c05ed6b61&e=b8a6795190)
---
|
---
| | | **ABOUT** John Cox is a political outsider who’ll shake up Sacramento and cut taxes. California is spiraling downward as it’s been failed by career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, and not those of the average Californian. John’s an outsider, who doesn’t owe the establishment anything. He understands what it’s like to scratch and claw to survive and succeed.

For more information please visit, [**johncox.com**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a781918a3b&e=b8a6795190)**** and follow @BeastJohnCox on social media.
